Laomis has lived up to its reputation as a paradise. Everywhere she looks, there's another view to appreciate, another meal to try, another kind local to meet...she can barely keep up with it all! How will she ever experience the whole island before the season ends?

Oh. That's right: summer will come again soon. Maybe, bit by bit, year by year, she can become a vacation master after all.

states.title: Magical Dragon Girl
states.description: Once, there was a girl known as a remarkable intellect even among the elven tribes. She was one of the very few chosen to work under the Celestial Lord in the laboratories of the Castle. Though arrogant, she had a strong sense of duty and righteousness, and swore to uphold her grand mission: to save the world.

states.title: Magical Dragon Girl
states.description: However, it didn't take long for her to realize that the laboratory's purpose wasn't what she had in mind. She sought to rescue the world from the evil that plagued it; her superiors, however, only desired greater power and greater profit. The doubt in her heart grew day by day, until the day of catastrophe arrived, and her fears were realized.

states.title: Magical Dragon Girl
states.description: She ran, to avoid being found out, but also to avoid meeting anyone. She couldn't bear to look anyone in the eye, with the guilt she felt gnawing away at her heart. She went to ground, and immersed herself once more in her forbidden research. And after hundreds of years alone, years of desperate experimentation and sacrifice, she may finally hold the answer.

states.title: Reclusive Witchling
states.description:
The witches of Lumains know what it is to be feared, but that doesn't stop them from fearing. Even among outcasts, those witches who have taken on the features of a dragon are shunned. Olive understands why: witches only grow their horns when they've pushed their magic to the brink, losing themselves to the siren song of its power. A dragon witch has shown they're not to be trusted.

She's never told anyone how she got her horns and her lone wing. She's never told anyone how she lost her eye. It wouldn't matter anyway. The truth rarely changes anyone's mind.

states.title: Reclusive Witchling
states.description:
Olive doesn't remember many things fondly, but she'll always treasure her mother's laugh. How she made the most delicious pastries. How she studied her spellbooks night and day, desperate to end the Holy Maiden's witch hunts.

It was that desperation that consumed her. Twisted into a dragon, more beast than woman, she attacked her own daughter, the very person she wanted most to save. In that struggle to protect herself, Olive grew her horns. If she hadn't, she doubts she would have survived.

Let the witches whisper that she's just like her mother, a disaster waiting to happen. She knows better than anyone the price of dark magic -- and knows too that sometimes, that price must be paid.

states.title: Petite Primordial
states.description:
Aria, like all other Primordials, was born at the foundation of her world. Gifted with power over death, her duty was to judge mortal souls as they passed to the afterlife. With a touch, she could live each person's greatest triumphs and vilest sins, and with a swing of her scythe, she could snuff out any mortal life she pleased.

Aria could never understand why the living feared her. Unlike other Primordials, she wandered their world as she pleased, desperate to understand those she would one day judge. But all who saw her ran and cursed her name, beseeching their gods to protect them from the specter of death.

Eventually, a Goddess answered their prayers.

states.title: Petite Primordial
states.description:
Aria doesn't remember much of her world's first True God. She's lived a long, long time, and shared too many memories to keep them all straight. But she does remember the day Orcanix first arrived. It was the day she realized she, too, might someday die.

The Undead Goddess commanded her hordes to hunt down and destroy the Primordial of Death, the one power capable of opposing her. Aria begged the mortals for shelter, but all turned her away, too terrified of Orcanix's assassins to risk her ire.

Only one man proved brave enough to protect her. A noble lord from the petty kingdom of Sanga, who foresaw the destruction to come.

states.title: Petite Primordial
states.description:
The lord and his trusted bodyguard offered Aria their hospitality, letting her do as she liked within their lands. At first, Aria mistrusted them, too used to mortal terror to accept their kindness blindly. But after years of their unflinching protection in the face of the undead, her legendarily prickly shell gradually gave way.

After an encounter with Orcanix's assassins left the lord's family dead, she decided she could no longer endanger them with her presence. She sealed herself inside her Primordial realm, asking her guardians to summon her only at their most desperate. Her imprisonment would ensure Orcanix never created a world without death, and more importantly, it would keep the two of them safe.

She would just have to get used to being alone again.

states.title: Warrior of the Nameless Beast
states.description:
Those who carry the royal blood of Sanga inherit two vows: a vow to protect their homeland, and a vow to guard the shrine of the Death Primordial.

Since birth, Ryouma has borne these vows, not that anyone knows. As a bastard, his blood is as much a secret as the stone door beneath the shogun's palace, the gateway between the world of the living and the dead. His mother raised him to live as a shadow, silently slipping along behind those in the light.

Perhaps, if he had inherited his father's wisdom instead of his pride, he could have obeyed her. But Ryouma was born a warrior through and through, and thus he sought one day to hunt the dragon with no name.

states.title: Warrior of the Nameless Beast
states.description:
The ancient dragons of Erden bore grand names: Fornaxos, Kaidaros, Altaireon, Diabolos. All were silenced when the Goddess came, never to be spoken again. Only the dragon who slithered between the stars survived to see the new world.

Ryouma located this beast in his mountain lair, determined to prove his blade could best a dragon. He gave the beast a good fight, but in the end, could not overcome his nimble grace and speed. Satisfied with his effort, he submitted himself to a warrior's death, certain no one he left behind would miss him.

The dragon, having glimpsed the young warrior's true potential, refused to kill him, and instead made him his apprentice.

states.title: Warrior of the Nameless Beast
states.description:
When Ryouma mastered the dragon's sword technique, he honored him by sharing his true name at last, then bid him return to his kingdom. At first, the people marveled at his skill, forcing the shogun to honor him with a place among his guard.

But honor breeds resentment, and shadows wither in the sun. When the time came for Ryouma's companions to cover his flank, they abandoned him instead.

All the mastery in the world cannot turn one blade into ten. As ever, he fought valiantly, but this time, the proud dragon warrior met his end.

At least, so the legend goes. Little do the storytellers know that samurai and his nameless dragon live still, preserved from death by powers beyond their control, destined to one day meet again.

states.title: The Hollow Heart
states.description:
"Specimen name: O55-1A
Status: Stable

Specimen took her first non-assisted steps this morning. Her language capability far outpaces her physical development: she repeatedly asked for aid walking around the laboratory, and stumbled more than once. Still, this represents significant progress on her part. The faster she achieves full maturity, the better.

I've gotten word from associates on the mainland that the Aeon Lords have been sighted once again. No news on whether it has officially begun, but I fear I am running out of time. I have only just produced a living homunculus. How will she take to her powers when she finally discovers them?

I can only pray for good fortune. A thing I must do far too often, for a scientist."

states.title: The Hollow Heart
states.description:
"Specimen Name: O55-1A
Status: Critical

Another blackout today. The specimen asked, as she often does, for a chance to venture outside the laboratory. I denied her and gave the usual reasons when asked why, but upon hearing them, her mana levels spiked. She broke a quarter of the equipment in her room before her power finally overcame her. I have dosed her with a memory poultice again. Let us pray that it continues to work.

I am starting to regret this iteration of the experiment. The specimen possesses immense strength, but cannot control her emotions. Integrating her into the Pandemonic system is crucial, but doing so in this state might spell doom for us all."

states.title: The Hollow Heart
states.description:
No one knows what made the Tuathan volcano erupt after so long lying dormant. Argento, ancient smith of the Aeon Lords, has been sure to keep it that way. A secret like the creation of homunculi should only be shared with worthy minds, and with the passing of Ossia's erstwhile creator, he can think of no one in the world who deserves it.

He has resurrected the poor thing, of course. Without a soul, returning a body to life is a simple thing. Frustratingly, her power over all six elements seems to have fled. But he has never known a setback he can't overcome.

Ossia's curiosity is as immense as her thirst for vengeance. He can make a weapon of her yet.

states.title: Tidewing Raptor
states.description:
In the native Tuathan tongue, Kau Lana translates to 'born of the wind and waves.' One can easily see how these dragons earned such a name. Equally agile in the sky and the sea, the Kau Lana struck fear into the ancient Tuathan islanders, who rarely ventured out to sea despite their reliance on it for food.

Fortunately, not all Tuathans cowered before the dragons. According to legend, a chieftain by the name of Kaleiha ascended Tuatha's volcano and battled the largest Kau Lana until, at last, it bent to his will. Since then, the two races have lived in peace, working together as dragonriding pairs to nurture and protect their home.

states.title: Tidewing Raptor
states.description:
Unfortunately, Tuatha's prosperity could not last forever. Eighteen years ago, its central volcano erupted after centuries of dormancy, burning the village to the ground. As a gesture of goodwill, Luther invited all the surviving villagers to join him in Rigland's capital. Naturally, he adopted the Kau Lana into the ranks of the Red Dragon Knights as well.

But the children of the wind and waves couldn't thrive so far from the sea. Year after year, their population dwindled, as the dragons rejected their new training and fled to the ruins of their island.

Some say those who sail near Tuatha these days can hear their echoing cries, mourning the home they lost.

states.title: Captain of the Guard
states.description:
Some men go to war for glory. Others for love of battle. Timia joined the war to follow in her father's footsteps, to see his dream of a united Erden fulfilled.

When she was but a child, he showered her with tales of the Bergarian royalty. The early tribal kings who shepherded their people through the mountains. The first true emperor, born of the Primordial of Light. They fought with true nobility, liberating the land from the tyrants who would divide it.

Their legends planted the seeds of courage in her heart. And when her father fell in battle, those seeds burst into bloom.

states.title: Captain of the Guard
states.description:
Despite her youthful idealism, Timia is no fool. She knows all too well the cost of war. In her military training, her superiors made her memorize the casualties of past battles. They led her unit to rebel villages, forcibly crushed to keep their people under Imperial rule. In every eye, she saw the pain of her father's death, and she came to a resolution.

She could not allow this to continue.

As long as divisions among the people exist, there will be war. As long as there is war, innocent blood will flow. For the sake of lasting peace, the other lands of Erden must fall. And until their people understand that, Timia will do what she must.

states.title: Venomous Rose
states.description:
Once upon a time, a little girl named Clarice lived with her mother on the streets of a very cold, very cruel city.

Clarice loved her mother dearly, but love could not fill their hungry bellies. Day after day, her mother would lead her around, asking for coin, for shelter, for anything.

No one could give her what she asked, because no one had anything to spare.

Finally, on a night when the wind cut like knives, she abandoned her daughter and never once looked back. What a bad little girl she must have been, for her own mother to leave her to die.

states.title: Venomous Rose
states.description:
Clarice found her way to the mansion of a lord. For a long, long time, the lord kept her as his servant, but she was so clumsy he sold her away, to a noble couple who needed a handmaiden for their daughter Ludmilla.

Even though she was a terrible maid, Ludmilla showed Clarice great kindness. She let her borrow her books and do her hair, and over time, they became the best of friends.

Until she grew up and didn't want her anymore. Until she tried to run away.

Why would she do that? Weren't they friends? Was she a bad girl again?

Why... why... why why why whywhywhywhywh—

states.title: Venomous Rose
states.description:
Clarice was a bad girl for a very long time. She hurt her best friend, then learned to hurt others too. A sorcerer gave her great power in exchange for her freedom, a trade she made all too happily. As long as he wouldn't abandon her, she'd never leave his side.

Little did she know, being left alone was not the same as being forgotten.

Though she had grown into a twisted assassin in their time apart, Ludmilla saw the lonely, scared girl inside Clarice. She forgave her for the terrible things she'd done, and released her from the evil binding her heart. For the first time in her life, Clarice was truly free.

A happy ending had found her after all.

states.title: Solitary Star
states.description:
The Goddess works in mysterious ways. Even with her lifelong apathy toward religion, Saya knows this to be true. Why else would they need the Requiem every hundred years? Not even the Church can explain just how the blood of ninety-nine innocent girls revives the world, but somehow it does, every century since the dawn of history. 

Truthfully, Saya only cared about the Requiem because some old composer chose to turn it into a ballet. Her teacher cast her as the Goddess's Grace, the lead, hoping to make her a star. 

In a way, she did. Soon after the performance, the whole world knew her name. But not for the reasons Saya had hoped.

states.title: Solitary Star
states.description:
It happened so fast. Her car dove off the bridge and crashed into the water below, submerging her, drowning her. It should have been her end, a rising star snuffed out by tragedy. For better or for worse, it wasn't. 

Deep beneath the river, Saya escaped the wreckage and rose light as air, buoyed by the burning power inside her. Something would not allow her to die. Not yet. Not before she'd served her purpose. 

As she soon learned, the Vessels of the Goddess cannot die before the Requiem. The shard of divinity inside her, the Goddess's Grace she'd shown through her dance, had protected her from death. 

But at what cost?

states.title: Solitary Star
states.description: In a way, being a Vessel and being an etoile aren't so different. They both sacrifice their freedom for a greater purpose, though dancers do so at least a little by choice. As a ballerina, Saya shut herself away, too busy dancing to bother with a normal life. She convinced herself hard work meant misery. She accepted that a person could either choose greatness or happiness, never both. Now, as a Vessel, she can live how she chooses. She can make friends, and eat sweets, and study the katana, even if swordwork goes against her Gift. There's nothing to prove anymore, not with the Requiem coming. And even though that should scare her, Saya's never felt so free.

states.title: Demon of Class 2-B
states.description:
The Church keeps records of the order they find the Vessels for the Requiem. In truth, it doesn't matter all that much. Some Vessels found early have always been weak, while a few Vessels found late have proven themselves to be contenders. 

Still, everyone knows Hibiki Himeno was the very first Vessel found. Even worse, no one knows her Gift. 

Speculation floats around, of course. The Goddess's Bloodthirst would explain her ferocity in battle. Wit would explain her ability to ace tests without studying. Some have suggested she's the Goddess's Luck, because who else could get away with half of what she does? 

But some say they saw her shadow shortly before they themselves awoke as Vessels. And no one can explain that.

states.title: Demon of Class 2-B
states.description:
In the past, Vessels have never managed to turn eighteen. As soon as the hundredth one is found, the Requiem begins soon after, and the world enjoys another century of peace. This has always happened within eighteen years, but so far it's been almost twenty, posing the school a unique problem: graduates who were never meant to graduate. 

Some, like Nanami and Reina, proved skilled enough to become staff at the school. Others remain in a small village nearby, working odd jobs and pretending they've escaped their death sentence. 

Hibiki, on the other hand? She's only a second year, despite being eighteen, and she likes it just fine. It's not like she has to worry about the future, after all.

states.title: Demon of Class 2-B
states.description:
What makes Hibiki an oni? Vessels who have traits of other species usually share their characteristics, so what is it that made those horns sprout out of her head? 

Most would say it's cruelty. The demon's horns give away her sadistic heart and cruel nature. They whisper about her vicious tactics in combat and defer to her every whim, scared of what she might do otherwise. 

She uses their fear, of course, because fear can get her what she wants. But those who've known her since the beginning can attest that she's never hurt anyone who didn't deserve it. 

Perhaps it's that talent for illusion that truly makes her an oni.

states.title: Fleetfoot Samurai
states.description:
Lightning Hare Nanami, Shinano Academy graduate and interim professor of combat. Vessel of the Goddess's Speed. 

That's how the other students know her, at least. To tell the truth, it weirds her out to think of herself as a professor. She'd always been a wild kid, right from the day they brought her to the school, and she can't say teaching high school girls how to beat each other up was her lifelong dream. But it hasn't been working out too badly...so far, at least. 

Everyone in the school knows her gift. With sword strikes so swift they're barely visible, there was never any hiding it. Some would say that puts her at a disadvantage. Nanami says anyone who wants to take her on is more than welcome to try.

states.title: Fleetfoot Samurai
states.description: Most of Nanami's students think her ears gave her away as a Vessel. And they're not totally wrong: a little girl with bunny ears will naturally draw more Church attention than her normal classmates. But even non-Vessels can gain an animal's ears or tail, if the Goddess chooses to bless them with it. No. Five-year-old Nanami saw a car hurtling towards a puppy in the road and dove out to save it. In a matter of seconds, she had not only reached the puppy and picked it up; she'd shot across the street, clear into the next neighborhood, too panicked to stop running. They found her downtown a day later, still holding the puppy. That was when the Church knew she was truly special.

A Christmas spirit with a mysterious gift box.
Enjoys snowball fights.

states.title: Maid of Midwinter
states.description:
Rizette always enjoyed helping out around the house. As trivial as that memory seems now, she holds it close to her heart. There was a time she couldn't remember anything of herself. Not her past, not her friends, nothing beyond Orcanix's latest orders. Sometimes, she's afraid she'll slip back into that horrific void.

So she remembers how it felt to tidy up her family's meager home. How her heart raced as she nursed Finn back to health. Perhaps she wasn't heroic before her fall, but she refuses to think those little acts of kindness meant nothing.

Keeping her loved ones safe and happy was the only life she ever wanted.

states.title: Maid of Midwinter
states.description:
She didn't love Finn as soon as she saw him. That would be too much like a fairy tale. When he arrived beaten and broken from the attack on his village, Rizette nursed him the same way she would any new refugee. They called her the Angel of the Outer City precisely because she never turned anyone away.

Still, she couldn't deny the kinship between them, both teenagers ripped from their families by the undead. When he had no place to go, it was only natural she invite him to live with her and her brother. How could she have known where it would lead?

How could she have known their growing love would lead to ruin?

states.title: Maid of Midwinter
states.description:
They went to fight Orcanix on the darkest night of the year, the bitter midwinter solstice prophesied by Callen and the Sages. Despite the biting cold, Rizette had always loved the holiday. It brought everyone she loved together, snug and cozy around a blazing fire. She thought she'd love it even more when it became the day they freed their people.

Even now, after everything she went through, she can't bring herself to hate wintertime. When the snow falls soft on the ground and the world stands still, she doesn't think of the night she lost everything. She doesn't think of the war, or the long path ahead of them towards peace.

She closes her eyes, remembers that all is well, and reaches for the love that keeps her warm.

states.title: Twilight Bride
states.description:
Come one, come all, to toast the dying year.

Astrid has prepared a feast for all of winter's wanderers. Her hearth burns warm and her table seats hundreds. As soon as night falls, she opens her gates and welcomes monster and innocent alike. She has been both. She knows that life flies by, no matter who you are, no matter what you've done. It is what separates the mortals from the gods.

Few view death as a celebration. But then, few can see it through Astrid's eyes.

Mortality, the chance to grow and change, is the greatest gift a soul can be given.

states.title: Twilight Bride
states.description:
There was a time she couldn't conceive of joy. Even now, the feeling seems a stranger to her, a guest she invited without truly knowing. Orcanix once convinced her revenge would be her joy, but even deep in the Goddess's thrall, she knew that was a lie.

Astrid never delighted in destruction. Looking back, she wonders how she managed to build the Rebellion when her heart was so black with misery. She didn't want to hurt Ludmilla. She didn't hate Last Bastion, or its Vanguard soldiers. She just wanted to know why.

What had she done to make her friend hate her so much?

states.title: Twilight Bride
states.description:
Reconciliation. Surely such a thing is impossible. What friendship can survive two heinous betrayals? Astrid was sure she would one day meet Ludmilla in hell, and they could finish whatever was left of their fight there.

Instead, her soul was found and forgiven. A lifetime of guilt disappeared from her shoulders all at once, and suddenly, she was pure. She couldn't say she deserved it, after everything she'd done, but when happiness finally came to her again, she welcomed it with open arms.

Mortals fear death as an unforgiving end; that is their eternal folly. Astrid knows now: death is but the start of something new.

states.title: Sparkling Idol
states.description:
Even as the world crumbles, nothing draws a crowd quite as big as Mirai's.  

It only makes sense that people line up in droves to see a Vessel in person. Never mind the ugly business of the Requiem. Mirai's voice is that of the Goddess, and it's said that all who hear it are blessed.  

Indeed, reports of civil disturbance plummet in the wake of her concerts. Everyone seems just a little happier. Nothing actually changes for the people, of course. A happy song can't end a famine or turn back a flood. But it can make them forget for a time. 

It's her duty to make them forget.

states.title: Sparkling Idol
states.description:
It's not that Mirai doesn't like being an idol. In fact, singing is the greatest joy she has in life. She sang long before she was put on stage. She thought, in her early days at the academy, that if she worked hard enough, they would let her leave and travel the world. 

She thought correctly. At ten years old, the Church began training her for the demanding lifestyle of an idol. She didn't mind the rigor, nor the invasion of her privacy. After all, her life was never really hers anyway. 

Sometimes she wishes she could sing as herself, without using the Goddess's voice. Just once, to see if the people still love her. 

She likes to think they would.

states.title: Sparkling Idol
states.description:
A voice is an instrument. It puts thoughts into words, nothing more. It does not think for itself, and certainly doesn't have its own will. 

That was her first lesson as an idol. She came in with a juvenile scrapbook of song ideas, only to be told she would never sing them. The ones she had written for her were made by true artists, she was told. She couldn't expect to ever match them. 

Mirai understands, in a way. But she can't stop scribbling down poems, or plucking out the melodies she hears on the wind. They might be the work of an amateur, but they are hers. 

And she hopes one of them can live on once she's gone.

states.title: Elysian Shadow
states.description:
Kana Narukami and her little sister Mirai were born with cat ears and a tail, in a world that was mostly human. 

Their parents took this as a sign of good fortune. Only those especially close to the Goddess took on the traits of an animal. Both sisters shared a cat's grace, its speed, as well as its knack for survival. Every time their poor family pulled through misfortune, their mother credited it to her daughters' blessings from the Goddess. 

One day, that blessing revealed itself as the curse it truly was. 

If she'd known Mirai's voice was that of the Goddess herself, Kana would never let her sing at all.

states.title: Elysian Shadow
states.description:
Men in black suits snatched Mirai off the street one morning as she sang for pennies from strangers. They told Kana they were from the Church, and thanked her for keeping a Vessel safe for so long. When Kana sank her teeth into the men taking her sister away, they knocked her out and left her there for Fate to do what it would. 

After a few hours, she woke up and did what any cat would do. She sought out food and shelter. She stayed in the shadows. She wore a mask to hide her horrid pain. 

She adapted. She survived, because she knew it was the only way she would ever get her sister back. 

And at long last, she thinks she's found a way.

states.title: Thunderhearted Heroine
states.description:
Antares has always been your average girl. 

Her grades are good enough not to disappoint, but she's far from the top of the class. She's pretty in a cute kind of way, but she doesn't turn heads. She's well-liked among her classmates, but not truly popular. 

She blends in so well that at times, she's afraid she'll disappear. 

But jealousy doesn't come naturally to her, and she can never stay mopey for longer than a day or two. Whenever she starts to feel down, she just looks around for what she loves. 

Even in a dying world, she finds things that make her smile. And even if she doesn't realize it, that is a remarkable gift.

states.title: Thunderhearted Heroine
states.description:
The thing about discovering your destiny is that you're never truly ready. Everyone's life is average until the moment it isn't -- and none have learned this better than Antares. 

She doesn't know if the Goddess influences fate itself, or if she's just very talented at stringing together coincidences, but as it would happen, her path crossed Mirai Narukami's totally by accident. By meeting her, she discovered the sinister plot of a foreign god looking to brainwash the world. 

And by discovering that plot, she found the power that slept inside her all along. The Goddess's Hope. 

As timid and unsure as she is, only she can save the world.

states.title: Thunderhearted Heroine
states.description:
There have been dozens of recorded Requiems, stretching back to the beginning of human history. Though they started off as earth-shattering wars between demigods, the establishment of the Goddess's Church helped bring the Vessels under a greater authority.  

For the last thousand years, the names and Gifts of each girl have been recorded, to ensure they are honored after their deaths. The specific Gifts the Goddess passes down vary with each cycle, but most make frequent returns, sometimes performing important deeds before passing on.  

Interestingly, Antares's gift has never once appeared. Perhaps that is why the Church has yet to track her down. They have never once looked in a Vessel's eyes and seen a glimmer of hope.

states.title: The Lost Von Draclow
states.description:
In another world, Luther von Draclow inherited the Red Dragon Knights from a long line of ancestors. But in this world, the world of the Requiem, he founded the military order himself.

A brilliant man, he married an equally brilliant woman to carry on his legacy. His first daughter, Astrid, lived up to his every expectation, and he believed her future siblings could one day surpass her.

But his vision was not to be. His wife passed away giving birth to his second daughter, who he would later name Anastasia.

In every other world, she perished with her mother. Only the technology of Pandora's world gave her the means to fight her Fate. To live.

states.title: The Lost Von Draclow
states.description:
Luther created the Ex Machina weapon alongside the Red Dragon Institute. Using a cloud of invisible nanomachines, an Ex Machina wielder could gain powers rivaling even those of the Goddess's Vessels. But this wasn't enough to satisfy him.

Little Anya's brain, kept in a coma while her body underwent medical treatment, proved to be more malleable than any other Luther had ever seen. He risked her life to mold it into a living quantum computer, capable of recording and even manipulating the forces of Fate.

Anya never knew exactly what her father was doing to her with all the surgeries she underwent. She only knew that if she kept surviving, she would meet her beloved sister Astrid.

states.title: The Lost Von Draclow
states.description:
Anya has almost died more times than she can count. She knows her body is fragile, held together only by her father's medical treatments. She knows her brain holds a special Ex Machina, a cutting edge prototype that puts her into a coma if she pushes it too far.

But she'll only meet her sister if she keeps on surviving.

It was lonely growing up in that hospital. She made friends of the shields she built, and the little drones she could summon with her power. But they couldn't pat her head or give her a hug. They couldn't be her family.

Only Astrid can. And she's out there somewhere, waiting for her.

states.title: Deadly Nurse
states.description:
Reina Fujiwara, third child of the Akise Fujiwara family, was never meant to amount to much. Her two older brothers were heir and spare to the Fujiwara real estate empire. Her parents believed she would stand quietly in their family photos, enjoy the luxury of their wealth, and one day marry some celebrity or prince to secure them political power.

They never once thought, not until the day the Church took her away, that they had given birth to a piece of the Goddess herself.

Reina became the Tenth Vessel of Pandora at age seven, bearing the Gift of the Goddess's Wisdom. And she is happier at Shinano Academy than she ever was at home.

states.title: Deadly Nurse
states.description:
Knowing her Gift, no one was surprised when Reina quickly surpassed her classmates in every academic subject. They promoted her from second grade to sixth within three months at the Academy, then sent her directly into high school a year after that. Nothing seemed to challenge the sharp little girl, who burned through every exam with masterful finesse.

Soon, Reina found herself studying on her own, taken out of the other girls' classes entirely. This was in part to spare them the pain of being so thoroughly bested, but that was not the only reason.

The teachers had noticed that tears, fights, and chaos followed wherever Reina went. For everyone's sake, it was better to keep her alone.

states.title: Deadly Nurse
states.description:
It surprises some to find out, but the Goddess's Wisdom and the Goddess's Intelligence are not the same Gift. Another Vessel in her class held the Goddess's Intelligence, in fact. She was a bright-eyed thing, reading years above her grade level, always studying and trying her best.

Reina outstripped her test scores every time they competed.

Intelligence comes from inborn talent and books. Wisdom comes from experience, and a Goddess has had millennia of that to pass on. It is why Reina chose to become a doctor, when nothing about her nature embraces healing.

A doctor sees people at their lowest. Even more than a warrior, a healer holds life in her hands. Among those desperate to escape death, nothing gives her more power than that.

states.title: Sakura Onmyoji
states.description: Once every decade, the sakura of Kisenkyo bloom and the Great Sage makes her appearance. Every time, she hears the whispers: "Betrayer." "Traitor." She says nothing, for she knows this is only what she deserves. Every decade, she witnesses Kisenkyo's peace, its prosperity, and their weight of her unforgiven sin.

states.title: Sakura Onmyoji
states.description: The reddish light of the setting sun, the scent of flowers and trees, and her mother's laugh. This is Rei's happiest memory, from when her father still watched over Kisenkyo. To her, an outsider, her mother was her only friend. With her mother a thousand years dead and gone, Rei wondered if she would ever laugh like that again.

states.title: Sakura Onmyoji
states.description:
"Finn, won't you bathe with me?"
"S-sorry, what?"
"I'm told that serious discussions should be had while baring all to one another."
"But—"
"Sage Rei! The women's and men's baths are separate!"
"Oh, really?"
"What a shame that is, Sir Finn."
"N-Nagi!"
"..."
"E-Elmina?"
"So nice to see you two getting along..."

states.title: Wild Guardian
states.description: One of Sage Rei's powerful shikigami. Its sharp teeth and claws stand ready to tear any who would invade Kisenkyo to shreds.

states.title: Wild Guardian
states.description: One of Sage Rei's powerful shikigami. Its sharp teeth and claws stand ready to tear any who would invade Kisenkyo to shreds.

states.title: Wild Guardian
states.description: One of Sage Rei's powerful shikigami. Its sharp teeth and claws stand ready to tear any who would invade Kisenkyo to shreds.

states.title: Pure Blue
states.description: When she was young, Rizette was a very timid girl. She would jump in fear at distant footsteps or the howls of wolves. Fortunately, her grandmother was always there for her. Her kind words never failed to bring a smile back to Rizette's face. But she never did understand the "courage" her grandmother spoke of.

states.title: Pure Blue
states.description:
When Rizette awakens, the sweet smell of pear pie fills the room. Half-asleep, she goes to the table, where her grandmother greets her with a smile. Theo arrives, still yawning, and the three of them start their day.
"Mm, so good!"
"Aah, hot!"
"Haha. Slow down, dear!"
"You're gonna burn your tongue again, Sis!"
She thought those days would last forever.

states.title: Pure Blue
states.description: When Rizette was young, bandits attacked Westcarte, and in the chaos, her grandmother lost her life. She's repeated that day over and over, hoping that things could be different, but in the end, the past cannot be changed. Even so, her grandmother lives on within her, supporting her every day. Nothing in the world can change that, either.

states.title: Red Riding Hood, Dragon Slayer
states.description: There are rumors among the townsfolk of a strange girl who lives in the forest. She dresses in an outlandish fashion and uses mysterious words, like "ebon", "abyss", "thanatos", and "wherefore". Then, she puts her hands on her hips, throws her head back, and laughs. Some people say she's a sorcerer. Others... just say she's having fun.

states.title: Red Riding Hood, Dragon Slayer
states.description: Today, as usual, she brings her beloved axe Van Helsing with her on a walk into the forest— for the doom of the Gods, the dawn of Ragnarok, draws nigh, and she must train. On that day, the powers of her cursed left eye, her evil right arm, and the darkness billowing inside her will all be unleashed... or so she says, causing her adoptive mother no end of worry.

states.title: Red Riding Hood, Dragon Slayer
states.description: There's a reason for her extreme fear of beasts. Her parents were kind and gentle folk who doted on their daughter in their little home in the woods. But one day, she came home to find them torn apart— with a wolfman, fangs dripping red, standing over their bodies. The image has never left her to this day.

states.title: Archer of the Woods
states.description: The always-bright and cheery Luna is, to the people of the slums, like the warm golden sun itself. A crack shot with a bow, she often goes bounty hunting; and while she's stingy with money, it's all so she has more to spread among the poorest people in town. While a dark secret lurks behind her bright smile, Luna never speaks of it to anyone.

states.title: Archer of the Woods
states.description: The first time she arrived in town, the suspicious and insular townsfolk turned her away, forcing her to live in the forest beyond the walls. One day, the town was besieged by bandits, and Luna, with only her trusty bow, dispatched them all. The townspeople were overjoyed, thanking her over and over. It was the first time she'd ever been accepted in her life.

states.title: Queen of Dreams
states.description: She has always been alone. Born in a snowy kingdom, she was kept imprisoned in a single room of a castle by her stepmother. Even when she was abandoned in the woods as a child and adopted by her new mother, she was unable to go outside. The outside world, framed by her window, has always been faded in shades of black and white.

states.title: Queen of Dreams
states.description: She was kinder and more pure than anyone. No one would doubt that. Yet within her, a pitch-black evil ate away at the snowy white of her heart. When it finally reached the tipping point...

states.title: Queen of Dreams
states.description: A being created from malice and ill will. In a sense, her purity of self has been retained— she now exists solely to destroy, to crush, to devour. The pure, almost childlike whims of her power will lead the world, all worlds, to ruin.

states.title: The Paladin Bride
states.description:
Even the flower petals dance, as if in celebration.
"Wait! I have no intention of marrying. This is just a test fit."
A pure white dress and long locks of raven hair. Her cheeks color as pink as the flower petals as she asks, "well? How do I look?"
Someday, someone may have the honor of answering her in truth.

states.title: The Paladin Bride
states.description:
The sun fills the air with a golden light as she turns back. "Hurry, dear, come on."
A past that may have been, or a future that may yet be. Even after she lays down her mace, she will surely continue protecting those she loves - her husband, her children, her family.

states.title: The Paladin Bride
states.description:
The pale moon tonight illuminates much, but does little to show you her true feelings.
An ancient legend of Eastland tells of a beautiful princess who, when none could win her favor, returned to her home on the moon, never to be seen again.
If you wish to prevent such a thing from happening again, you must speak now, from the heart.

states.title: Black Summer Rose
states.description:
"Kuhuhu. How do I look, Miss? It suits me? My, how wonderful to hear."
"Since we have the chance, would you do me the honor of playing with me? You would!? Then please, assist me in making a boat. Once we have, we can row to a deserted island, then send the boat out into the sea. Then it will be just you, me, and our love, forever."

states.title: Black Summer Rose
states.description:
"Miss! Would you care for a drink?"
"Ah, this other one? Mm. You, over there. If you must stare so enviously, then here, have it before the ice melts."
(How rude of you, to intrude upon my private time with my Mistress. For all you know, someone might have put something in that. Fortunately for you, that isn't the case... this time. Kuhuhu...)

states.title: Black Summer Rose
states.description: Between a bright blue sky and soft white sand, the maid and her mistress play together. Separated by a desperate sin, reunited by a chance twist of fate. Only time will tell if further tragedy lies in their future, but for now, the two laugh and smile together, as the surf laps the sand.

states.title: Bashful Bunnygirl
states.description: Rizette spent the night before the trip to Orka worrying. About what? The request from Callen, of course. Even imagining wearing a swimsuit was mortifying. So, she picked the one that showed the least amount of skin... but a monster attack and a perverted frog had other ideas.

states.title: Bashful Bunnygirl
states.description: Rizette, moved by the plight of a young girl, agreed to take the place of her imprisoned parents. She was told her role would be as a "waitress", but what she got was a "bunnygirl" outfit. Still, the girl's tears moved Rizette to press forward. Though she felt nothing but apprehension, she was greeted with a loud cheer as she stepped onto the floor.

states.title: Bashful Bunnygirl
states.description:
"Hey, bro! They've got some seriously cute girls working here!"

"No lie, bro! You see that girl over there?!"

Before she knew it, Rizette's table was the most popular table in the casino.

states.title: Seaside Scholar
states.description: To Callen, who spent her days cooped up in her lab, the sun-soaked paradise of Orka was practically an alternate dimension. But despite her protests, she actually found it somewhat enjoyable - the headlong rush into a new, unknown world.

states.title: Seaside Scholar
states.description: Callen's workaholic tendencies didn't lend themselves well to a balanced diet, leaving her snacking on chips and candy rather than proper meals. Once, she was taunted by Druke for her eating habits. "I-I can handle this just fine!", she insisted, popping Brussels sprouts into her mouth. She passed out and it took half an hour for her to wake back up.

states.title: Seaside Scholar
states.description: Callen viewed her current form as a sort of punishment. Punishment for her overconfidence in her own abilities, her over-focus on results, and the hubris that cost her her valued mentor. But her mentor, in their last moments, did not hate Callen. Proud though she may be, beneath it is a kind and dutiful woman.

A mysterious creature that wears a Mori mask. It secretly inserts itself into a family or a group of friends, pretending to be one of them. Though it seems harmless and tends to sleep a lot, it's unclear what its true intentions are...

states.title: Maiden of Darkness
states.description:
She was the hero of her country. She was a saint to all the Followers of Light - until the very people who adored her betrayed her and condemned her to death.

Now, she rises again from the ashes. Her banner flies high, no longer a symbol of light, but of darkness.

states.title: Maiden of Darkness
states.description: As the flames charred her sister's flesh, Mikaela couldn't block out the screams and the sounds of agony. She did what she had to do, what any sister would do for her sibling. But she could not have anticipated the true cost of her actions.

states.title: Maiden of Darkness
states.description:
In another world, life seems different for the twin sisters. In this peaceful world, they go to school, participate in extracurricular activites, and live normal lives.

However, each world in the multiverse is governed by the same law: a constant cycle between life and death. In this world, just as in Erden, peace is only a transitory state. For the twin sisters, the blissful years of high school will soon descend into total chaos.

states.title: Fallen Angel
states.description: Jeanne's twin sister and guardian angel, who has fallen into darkness and watches over her sister from the shadows.

states.title: Fallen Angel
states.description: Jeanne's twin sister and guardian angel, who has fallen into darkness and watches over her sister from the shadows.

states.title: Fallen Angel
states.description: Jeanne's twin sister and guardian angel, who has fallen into darkness and watches over her sister from the shadows.

states.title: Dark Guardian Dragon
states.description: I always used to hear a voice. A gentle voice. So gentle, it seemed it might break.

states.title: Dark Guardian Dragon
states.description: I don't understand anything...not anymore. But, if you are her enemy, then... I'll obliterate you, to the last speck of dust.

states.title: Dark Guardian Dragon
states.description: I see now. This voice. Like the sea. Mother's voice. Mother, Mother, I'm coming to you now.

states.title: Violet-Eyed Assassin
states.description: Elmina's past is dark and cruel, and it will never leave her. But that darkness is what gives her strength, and makes her kind.

states.title: Violet-Eyed Assassin
states.description: "I'm not going to let anyone fool me ever again. But it doesn't mean I don't want to trust you all, though."

states.title: Violet-Eyed Assassin
states.description: "You sure have gone out of your way for me. You really are a strange one, you know that?"

states.title: Halloween Idol
states.description: Mirai has a special song that she sings only once a year. No matter how cruel the world may be, on that day, she wants everyone to enjoy candy and dressing up in strange costumes. She wants to give them a chance to smile.

states.title: Halloween Idol
states.description: When her concert is finally over, Mirai stealthily goes to enjoy the festival. After growing up in a poor home, the endless rows of candies seem like a dream to her. A little embarrassed, a little happy, she takes as much as she likes.

states.title: Halloween Idol
states.description:
After the festival, she returns to her room. Her eyes are heavy and her feet are sore, but she can still hear people's cheers ringing in her mind. People's hopes, and the laughter of children, rise as if from the grave. She smiles to herself, alone in her room.
"Trick or treat."

states.title: Fox-Eared Blader
states.description:
Let's go!
Just like always, Mysha can be seen swinging her greatsword, kicking up gusts of wind. Someone once asked her if she didn't get bored doing the same thing every day.
"Of course not! It's totally different every time. I was faster yesterday than the day before. I'm stronger today than I was yesterday. And I'll be even better tomorrow!"
She keeps on striving toward the pinnacle.

states.title: Fox-Eared Blader
states.description:
She may not remember her birth parents well, but she grew up with Gilgan, so she's able to keep smiling.
She may not be kud, but the people of Urg Roa accepted her all the same, so she's able to keep smiling.
She's faced many hardships, but she's been blessed with happiness above and beyond the dark times. "That's why I want to keep smiling forever!"
"Konkon! May good fortune, safety, and happiness be with you always!"

states.title: Fox-Eared Blader
states.description:
Uncle Druke...
"Grrrrgh!!"
"Gramps has always waited for you, you know. He always looks so sad..."
She calls out to him over and over, but the beast shows no recognition.
"The more stories I heard about you, the prouder I was about you. Even if we aren't related by blood, I'm proud to be your niece. And now we've finally met, but..."

states.title: White Snake Onmyoji
states.description: Mizuchi Akame is the descendant of the sacred White Snake, and an elite member of the most prestigious Bureau of Onmyo in Outer Eastland. While little is known about the isolationist region of Outer Eastland, the White Snake Onmyoji is widely rumored to be one of the four elite onmyoji who protect Outer Eastland from the Pandemonium.

states.title: White Snake Onmyoji
states.description: In a parallel world where society has fully embraced science and technology, concepts such as "onmyodo" and magic are relics of the past. However, in this world, she is one of the few people called "Superhumans", people with supernatural abilities that would be considered magic in Erden. While many Superhumans tend to avoid the limelight, she is very outgoing and has no fear of being seen in public.

states.title: White Snake Onmyoji
states.description: In her first year of high school, she became an internet celebrity after the videos she posted online went viral. Now, millions of fans tune into her channel to hear about her daily life as a Superhuman. Soon, streaming videos online and interacting with her numerous fans became her second life.

states.title: Scarlet Oni Samurai
states.description:
In a land far to the East, there lives an oni. This oni, however, is a slayer of her fellows.
She prays to no gods, performs no rituals. Yet when battle looms, she is the first to ready her blade. She is the Scarlet Oni, the one who strikes at her fellows' throats without mercy.
"I'm Hibiki, the oni hunter. Eh? Why's an oni hunting oni? ...Say that one more time and I'll take your head clean off."

states.title: Scarlet Oni Samurai
states.description:
Hotter, hotter, hotter. Blood seeks, craves blood. The fire within her rages outward, onward. It burns those her crimson gaze passes over. In her nightclothes, she can even hear it— the pounding rush of her heart pumping her burning blood.
Oni blood, irresistibly pulling her along a path she has no choice but to walk.
"Your blood's red, same as mine..."

states.title: Scarlet Oni Samurai
states.description: "Tempura, ise-ebi...damn if this stuff ain't good. And the takoyaki. ...Nom nom. Yeah, that's good too. C'mon, eat already." Rough speech, and an utterly relaxed posture, with plenty of half-eaten food around to top it off. A vision from another possible world, perhaps. A world with no war between humans and oni. The happy laughter of the oni maiden echoes, faintly, from distant memories.

states.title: Knight of the Holy Eve
states.description:
Inside the castle, the party continues, with food, chatter, and the clink of glasses. But Ludmilla finds herself outside, alone, her cheeks and nose reddened by the cold. A clinging dress, uncomfortable high heels... "What am I doing in these? They don't suit me at all..." Her sigh is white mist in the frozen night.
"That's not true at all, Miss." Hearing a soft voice and footsteps behind her, she turns.

states.title: Knight of the Holy Eve
states.description:
Ludmilla sighs as Clarice pours her another flute of champagne. "A Marshal should never drink on duty..."
"You aren't on duty now. Why not indulge, just for tonight?" Ludmilla can't argue with that, and picks up her glass. Pleasant drink and pleasant company while the hours away.

states.title: Knight of the Holy Eve
states.description:
Ludmilla's plan to put her tipsy maid to bed goes awry. "Miss, Miss∼!"
"Ah! Clarice, stop wiggling!"
"I love you so much, Ludmilla. Won't you stay with me tonight!?"
"T-too close!"
While wrestling with Clarice is exhausting, the melancholy she had felt just a few hours before has completely vanished.

states.title: Annihilation Girl
states.description: Don't get close to her. Don't even look at her. Her frail body and distant gaze may make her look defenseless, but if she recognizes you as an enemy, the very next moment will be your last.

states.title: Annihilation Girl
states.description: There are rumors of a young girl taking to the battlefield alongside soldiers of the Bergarian Empire, but no witness accounts. After all, none who stand against her return home alive. One foe may be pierced by countless blades, another crushed and strewn across the battlefield. All, it is whispered, die by her hands.

states.title: Annihilation Girl
states.description: There are none who know what thoughts or emotions reside behind that blank and distant stare, if any actually do. The only hint of humanity is in the way she sometimes looks up at the sky, as though remembering something or someone, and the faintest hint of sadness in her gaze.

states.title: Brilliant Magic Researcher Girl
states.description: A long, long time ago a prodigy was born in a faraway elven village. The talk of the town for years, she was invited to work at a research institute, but when she arrived there, the head researcher couldn't hide his surprise. That's because the famed genius looked like she couldn't be older than ten.

states.title: Brilliant Magic Researcher Girl
states.description: Before long, rumours about her impertinence, her weird laugh, and her penchant for sweets and junk food swept the institute. However, her talent and passion for research were unparalleled, and the mockery surrounding her soon turned into envy.

states.title: Brilliant Magic Researcher Girl
states.description: Even after all these years, her teacher's memory is fresh in her mind. Wiser than anyone she knew, the one she respected like no-one else, the one lost to her childish thoughtlessness. She has devoted herself to her research, in hope that one day she can atone for her past and live up to the ideal he set.

states.title: Valentine's Day Maiden
states.description: Hello...! W-What a coincidence. No, I just happened to have an errand to run nearby... What do you mean I look nervous...? I-I'm certainly not. Um, b-by the way, do you know what day it is today...?

states.title: Valentine's Day Maiden
states.description:
One day earlier:
"Mikaela! You need to measure the sugar before adding it!"
"Nah, it'll be fine."
"It won't! It'll taste weird!"
"So what? It's just a customary gift, doesn't need to be perfect."
"Yes, b-but..."
"Ahaha, just kidding. Don't worry, your big sis has your back♪"
"Ugh, you're so mean...!"

states.title: Valentine's Day Maiden
states.description:
"Yikes, what a mess..."
"I'm so sorry! If I hadn't tripped..."
"It's fine, I should've been more careful—Pfff! Ahahaha!"
"H-hey, what are you laughing at...?"
"Ahaha! You're all covered in chocolate, Jeanne!"
"Oh, come on, Mikaela—Hehe, actually, you too."

states.title: Valentine's Day Angel
states.description:
Mikaela smiles to herself, as she watches Jeanne clumsily but earnestly try her hand at making chocolates. The Holy Maiden, carrying a fate so profound, with such strength in her heart—And yet, right now she is just a girl in love, her darling little sister.
"I don't know, Mikaela, what do you think...?"
"Alright, here comes the expert! Let's see..."

states.title: Valentine's Day Angel
states.description:
Mikaela smiles to herself, as she watches Jeanne clumsily but earnestly try her hand at making chocolates. The Holy Maiden, carrying a fate so profound, with such strength in her heart—And yet, right now she is just a girl in love, her darling little sister.
"I don't know, Mikaela, what do you think...?"
"Alright, here comes the expert! Let's see..."

states.title: Valentine's Day Angel
states.description:
Mikaela smiles to herself, as she watches Jeanne clumsily but earnestly try her hand at making chocolates. The Holy Maiden, carrying a fate so profound, with such strength in her heart—And yet, right now she is just a girl in love, her darling little sister.
"I don't know, Mikaela, what do you think...?"
"Alright, here comes the expert! Let's see..."

states.title: Thoroughbred Idol
states.description: Sakura Hayate has never been a very good singer. She's not a particularly skilled dancer either. Still, she sings, and dances, and never stops smiling. Just to see that bright smile, thousands of fans are ready to wait in line for hours before her every performance.

states.title: Thoroughbred Idol
states.description: Before the show begins, she takes a moment to tell herself she's going to be okay. Though she seems so cheerful and carefree when on stage, she's the hardest working member of the group, always staying in the rehearsal room long after the others have gone home. This earnestness is what makes her who she is, but it sometimes makes her feel like the pressure of it all is about to crush her.

states.title: Thoroughbred Idol
states.description: They were just about to wrap up their last number when it happened. She stumbled and fell, and just stayed down, unable to understand how she could make such a blunder at the very last moment. She felt her eyes well up with tears, when suddenly someone's hand touched her shoulder. "It's OK," one of the other group members said, helping her up with a smile. And just like that, she remembered that she wasn't alone, that they were in this together. Her bright smile back in place, she joined her friends to finish up the last dance of that night.

states.title: Red Dragon Bride
states.description:
Underneath the cloudless sky, Astrid appears in her finest attire yet, causing her secret admirers among the commoners and soldiers alike burst into deafening applause. However, she herself doesn't seem pleased with her outfit.
"I have been told this is going to be the presentation of a new combat uniform... They set me up...!"

states.title: Red Dragon Bride
states.description:
"Looking good, Astrid!" a young man tells her after the ceremony.
"How insolent! You think you can mock me just because of this unbecoming outfit?" she snaps, face red with anger.
"No, I'm being serious!"
"You obviously are not! I won't let you get away with it!" she says but the man finds her embarrassment charming. "And what are you smiling at now, you oaf!?"

states.title: Red Dragon Bride
states.description:
This must be some kind of a dream, because her beloved is here with her, smiling. And she can be herself and let her guard down too, even though usually she has to be the invulnerable Commander her knights need. Ah, what a sweet dream...
"But I have a mission to accomplish," she mumbles to herself as she wakes up, still reveling in faint traces of that dream's warmth.

states.title: Fox-Eared Idol
states.description:
"Alright, everyone! Are you ready!? Konkon∼♪"
From the moment she arrives on stage as the live starts, the fans' cheers never die down. She was born to be an idol, in some ways more so than Mirai or Sakura, because no-one enjoys their performances like she does—not even the audience.

states.title: Fox-Eared Idol
states.description: Mysha's stamina seems to be endless. She never runs out of breath during dance lessons, and is just as lively after an exhausting performance as she was before. During the yearly Idol Sports Day event, her team is always sure to win. And when she runs with all her energy and enthusiasm on display, the audience just can't look away.

states.title: Fox-Eared Idol
states.description:
When it comes to SNS, Mysha is not quite like other idols. Photos of her messy room, dumbbells and various gaming consoles lying around, snacks everywhere, her tousled bed head—no filters, no edits, just a realistic depiction of her life. But that's exactly the secret of her popularity, even though she herself doesn't seem to realize it.
"I messed up again... Next time I'll look cuter, I promise!"

states.title: Degenerate Oni Queen
states.description:
Tonight, as the moon brushes stray clouds away, its light falls on the beautiful cherry blossoms that mark the end of winter—ah, no, no. It falls on a bewitching oni monarch, whose arrival marks the end of the human world. Those who dare take but one look at her can smell a flowery scent in the air, can hear laughter ringing out like a bell.
In the end, they get to know why at times cherries bloom in red.

states.title: Degenerate Oni Queen
states.description:
Touch repaid with destruction, smile—with fear, trust—with betrayal. There are only those who have power and those who don't. Those with horns and those without them. And in both cases, a world in which the latter outnumber the former was one too weak for the Oni Queen's liking, too small. She isn't kind about it—she'll be out tonight as well, destroying, devouring, amusing herself, as the mysterious Shuten-Douji should.
Makes you wonder what came first—the stones being thrown at the mere sight of horns, or the oni girl wishing for freedom.

states.title: Degenerate Oni Queen
states.description:
Always seeking pleasure in any shape or form, she indulges each and every one of her whims—and drinks to excess wherever she goes. She's free, unfettered, and so she doesn't need to bother telling dreams and reality apart. It's only natural that they call her Shuten, a drunkard. Who knows if she herself remembers her actual name.
Have a drink with her, and the next thing to quench her thirst might be your blood.

states.title: Goddess of the Earth
states.description: Wherever she went, life followed—barren earth sprouted flowers, withered trees burst into leaf, villages exhausted by drought came alive again. Before long, people started calling her a goddess—Gaia, the Goddess of the Earth.

states.title: Goddess of the Earth
states.description: No one knew where she came from or where she would go next; no one really knew her at all. People tried to stop her from leaving at times, but she'd still disappear, leaving behind only a fleeting smile. The desire to keep her grew into obsession, bred conflict, stained the earth with blood. And so she stopped showing up altogether.

states.title: Goddess of the Earth
states.description:
Vesh watches her from the shadows as she sits by a small spring in her sacred forest, her eyes vacant, staring off into space. She seems to notice him after a while, turns her head ever so slightly.
"I apologize for the intrusion," he says, but she only shakes her head with a smile.
"How unusual of you to visit this realm," he picks up after a moment, and her eyes look distant again, as if she remembered something, "My lady Gaia, Primordial of Earth."

states.title: Knight of the Sacred Fire
states.description: From time immemorial, humanity has always seen divinity in fire. Likewise, there were always those who thought that if they could find a way to kindle a flame within themselves, they would attain divinity as well.

states.title: Knight of the Sacred Fire
states.description:
There were some who saw her burning, crimson eyes, her beauty like a flower blooming on the battlefield, and thought her a god too.
Still, depending on who looks, a god might just as easily be a demon.

states.title: Knight of the Sacred Fire
states.description: Every flame must sooner or later go out—when a candle burns out, when sudden rain quenches a raging wildfire, when a life comes to an end. However, the Sacred Fire will burn again someday—when the promised day comes.

states.title: Nine-Tailed Calamity
states.description:
The foxfire burns — an unreachable flame, always flickering, and eventually turning dark.
Like countless hands inviting you to join them in the shadows.

states.title: Nine-Tailed Calamity
states.description:
Whatever you do, do not wake her up.
They say that this demon has once disguised herself as a beautiful girl and devoured people throughout the capital. Finally, thanks to the courage of a group of heroes, her spirit was sealed and peace descended on the city once again.

states.title: Nine-Tailed Calamity
states.description:
The dark fire vanishes when approached, but never really goes out, the embers always smoldering, always lurking.
Hidden away inside an unsuspecting girl, they await a chance to burn again.

states.title: Mysterious Shrine Maiden
states.description: If you pass the torii gate and follow the road up to the shrine, you might catch a glimpse of Momoka Kamiya dancing in the main pavilion. A girl with adorable cow horns, the one rumored to be the symbol of good luck.

states.title: Mysterious Shrine Maiden
states.description: People would laugh and cry with her, and love her like their own precious nadeushi statue. But one day she disappeared without a word, as if spirited away.

states.title: Mysterious Shrine Maiden
states.description: At that time, a mysterious phantom started haunting the town, bringing its citizens rampage and sleepless nights. And the people prayed for the girl to return, for the power of luck to defeat their fears. They prayed to see that beloved smile again.

states.title: Dragon Bride
states.description: "W-Well, say something, you fool!" Callen demands, puffing up her blushing cheeks. "Honestly, and here I spent so much time on dressing up—H-Hey, I am not being vain! And I did not do it for you, I did it for myself—" She flounders for a minute, before calming herself down. "Hmpf, forget it. Now, come here already!"

states.title: Dragon Bride
states.description:
"Hohoho, what is it? You turned awfully red all of a sudden. Has my outstanding beauty rendered you speechless?" Eager to get a reaction, Callen attempts to strike an alluring pose on the piano bench. However, her unathletic body struggles to keep up and she promptly loses her balance. 
"Eeeek! H-Hey! What are you gawking at? Help me up, you idiot!"

states.title: Dragon Bride
states.description:
Burdened by the unforgivable crime of her youth, she never thought she had the right to be happy; even though everyone around her wished her well, she could never show herself the same courtesy. But at least in her dreams, whenever she falls asleep on her lab desk...
"You say you can make me happy? If so, let us be together until the end of time."

states.title: Sakura Bride
states.description: After countless centuries spent in a gloomy magical realm, Rei finds herself dazzled. The bright light filling the church, the sparkling raindrops scattered over cherry blossoms, the perfectly clear blue sky—it's almost too much. But it is all meant to celebrate her, and before she knows it, she has stopped in the middle of the aisle, overwhelmed with emotion.

states.title: Sakura Bride
states.description:
There are unexpected, familiar faces among the guests, and Rei's eyes go wide in surprise. The bikki from Kisenkyo have come, and they are calling out to her from the distance, not a hint of strain in their smiles.
"You look so beautiful, Sage Rei!"
It feels as if her past sin and their years of resentment all have vanished, just for today. As Rei waves back at them, her eyes well up with tears.

states.title: Sakura Bride
states.description:
"It is customary to sleep together after the ceremony, isn't it?" Rei says as she climbs into bed, her cheeks flushed from all the alcohol she's drunk during the celebrations, her breath a little uneven. However, she is fast asleep the minute her head touches the pillow.
For centuries, that was all that she's wanted—someone who would sleep by her side. As the Sleeping Beauty dreams, a peaceful smile appears on her face.

states.title: A Midsummer Snow's Dream
states.description: Snow White has never seen the sea before. Raised in a dark forest on the outskirts of a small kingdom, she's only ever heard of things like the summer sun and the azure sea in bedtime stories. "S-Sorry I made you wait," she says, nervousness mixed with excitement in her voice. When your eyes meet, she makes a peace sign with both hands to hide her embarrassment. "Let's make a lot of good memories today!"

states.title: A Midsummer Snow's Dream
states.description:
"What a revolting season..."
Unexpectedly, Snow Black manifests to take control. However, she seems to have emerged at the wrong moment—she immediately hides from the sun underneath a beach umbrella, loudly voicing her displeasure. Evil as she is, even she cannot bring herself to act in uncomfortable conditions.
"What are you waiting for? Hurry up and help me put on some sunbathing oil."

states.title: A Midsummer Snow's Dream
states.description:
Even the warmest midsummer dream turns into a chilling nightmare in Snow Black's hands. Her bitterness unleashed, she freezes the sun, the sea, even the summer moon, and fills people's hearts with fear.
"I won't let you ruin everyone's summer fun," a voice says, and all of a sudden there's a girl standing before her.
"Haha, you came at last! Very well, let's have some fun... Princess."

states.title: Cerulean Sorcerer
states.description: When the Empire came and took away everything he had, Theo didn't give in to despair. Here, among the charred ruins of his hometown—the place where they once led such peaceful lives—he makes his vow. To protect the white flowers that started blooming here again. To become a full-fledged Blue Dragon Knight, one that can defend his beloved sister.

states.title: Cerulean Sorcerer
states.description: When Rizette comes home after carrying out all her daily duties—securing food supplies, maintaining order in the neighboring villages, recruiting new Blue Dragon Knights, scouting the territory ocuppied by Bergarian forces—Theo always waits for her with a homemade meal. In his hands even the plainest ingredients turn into the finest cuisine. "I'm sorry I can't do much more yet," he says modestly, and Rizette's heart swells with pride.

states.title: Cerulean Sorcerer
states.description:
After Rizette leaves in the morning, Theo quietly devotes himself to his training. A particular memory always keeps him company—the memory of a man who showed him kindness, even if in a stiff, awkward way; a man who set out to be a hero and put his life on the line in order to atone for his past crimes. 
Every day, Theo strives to get a little stronger, so that he can keep his legacy alive.

states.title: Crimson-Eyed Vampire
states.description: If you happen to hear mysterious footsteps echoing in the gathering dusk, don't look back. Because once you get a glimpse of her eyes, you won't be able to resist the temptation within.

states.title: Crimson-Eyed Vampire
states.description: Snip, snip, snip—a chilling, metallic sound keeps ringing out. It blends with an animalistic, sorrowful cry. It blends with an innocent, childlike laughter.

states.title: Crimson-Eyed Vampire
states.description: Nothing like freshly spilled blood to spur her excitement, awaken her cruelty. Night after night, she lets the brilliant, vivid red—like the setting sun, like her eyes—stain the purest white of her teeth.

states.title: Sorceress of Prophecy
states.description: And so the world shall meet its demise by the hand of the god who rules over reason; the world of the living shall face the threat of the dead—just as it has been written in the book owned by a certain sorceress.

states.title: Sorceress of Prophecy
states.description: They speak of the king who commanded the remarkable Knights of the Round Table, and of the sorcerer to whom he owed his authority—one told to have wielded power on par with the king himself, power capable of bringing the world to ruin.

states.title: Sorceress of Prophecy
states.description: Beware of flattery, beware of temptation—they are the snake that lures souls into the original sin, the forbidden fruit that leads to downfall. As always, the warning is accompanied by his laughter—her laughter, a vision of the Judgment Day reflected in her eyes.

states.title: Goddess of Love and War
states.description: Love and war—these two aren't opposites. Sometimes people fight because of love, sometimes love is born from fighting. And sometimes, conflict is an irrefutable proof of love.

states.title: Goddess of Love and War
states.description: The red-headed goddess's love burns vehemently, beautifully. What she loathes the most is a cowardly heart. In her eyes, there is no expression of love beyond mutual struggle.

states.title: Goddess of Love and War
states.description: A single figure stands among the sea of corpses, as if grieving. Yet again, no man could withstand the ferociousness of her love. As she looks up to the sky, her heart makes a wish—for true peace, possible only through conflict, and for fulfilment of her love.

states.title: Canine Blademaster
states.description: On a moonlit night, Rin Inugami calmly prepares for the approaching battle—no chink in her armor, no second wasted on sleep. With an imposing aura befitting the strongest of the Four Masters of the Bureau of Onmyo, she surveys the night with her piercing gaze.

states.title: Canine Blademaster
states.description: In order to subdue evil, one must learn to be cool-headed. To protect her country, Rin became the most realistic of the onmyoji. Even if one of her subordinates was murdered right in front of her, she would never let any feelings show up on her face.

states.title: Canine Blademaster
states.description: No matter how strict her attitude, how brutal her drills, how aloof the face she always wore, Rin's subordinates could never hate her. They knew her—the deepest devotion hiding behind her mask, the beauty of the countless tears she secretly shed every time she lost someone.

states.title: Sacred Deer Onmyoji
states.description: If you happen to hear a noise in the woods after dark, and catch a glimpse of a girl surrounded by soft white glow, that would be Haku Urushido. Her aura alone can separate darkness from light; her brush draws the line between this life and the next one. And her smile can cleanse whatever impurity dwells in your heart.

states.title: Sacred Deer Onmyoji
states.description:
She likes peace and quiet.
She likes reading.
This place, bathed in sunlight, filled with the scent of tea, is like a sanctum of sorts. When she sits here, engrossed in her books, no-one dares interrupt her, but if you take a look every now and then, you may see her blushing. Because the books she prefers are all about love.

states.title: Sacred Deer Onmyoji
states.description:
How strong must a feeling be to turn a waterfall crimson? She tries to envision this feeling whenever she chooses to be alone among nature.
Once the girl in love with love actually falls for someone, the waterfalls, rivers and mountains will surely all turn red for her.

states.title: Bewitching Devil
states.description:
The autumn harvest festival. Children flock to the streets, dressed as evil spirits to protect themselves from the real evil. A single grown woman can be seen among them, however, her body and mind differ greatly in age. Though an adult in appearance, in spirit she's no different than the children pestering passers-by for treats. It is no surprise, then, that she too wanted to wear a costume—even if she couldn't quite find the right size.
"How do I look, Mama? If you don't say 'cute', I will play a trick on you...!"

states.title: Bewitching Devil
states.description:
Due to the size of the gap between her physical and mental age, or maybe due to the enormous power dwelling in her body, her mind is trying to catch up abnormally fast. But there is a price for defying the natural order, that is how this world works. And the price for her rapid growth—or rather evolution—was ethics and morals.
"Will you play with me...? No, I will make you my playmate myself, hahaha..."
What makes people unable to look away is that hint of childishness mixed with all the seductiveness, that bit of charm among all the innocence. It shows in her looks, her words, and seems to monopolize the thoughts of those who meet her.

states.title: Bewitching Devil
states.description:
At last, her childlike mind has reached maturity. She rests, surrounded by a rich assortment of sweets and desserts. If you try to look away, she'll fix you with a challenging gaze, as if asking if you really don't want more.
She is not human, she's a creature made to resemble humans and surpass them—it is only natural, then, that she looks down on us. "If you think you, a human, can devour me, if you think you can hurt me, come and try," says her prideful, bewitching smile.

states.title: The Great Sage, Heaven's Equal
states.description: Sun Wukong is a mountain rogue, and all the mountain animals are her underlings. However, at first, she was just a weak little child, abandoned by her parents. And the Monkey God up on the mountain just couldn't leave her like that, so he took her in and raised her. Now she has grown pretty big, but her curiosity is even bigger, so she was sent on a journey with a new Master called Tang Sanzang.

states.title: The Great Sage, Heaven's Equal
states.description: During the journey, some bandits targeted Master Sanzang. But that's exactly what Sun Wukong the bodyguard is for! She hadn't been raised by the Monkey God for nothing. She rounded the bad guys up in no time, with the techniques learned from the Monkey God and her trusty size-changing staff. At first glance, it looks like she's unbeatable, but the truth is, even she has a weak point...

states.title: The Great Sage, Heaven's Equal
states.description: "Ouch. ouch, ouch... I'm sorry, Master, I won't do that again..." Here's Sun Wukong's only weakness—the magical headband that Master Sanzang put on her head. When she does something bad, Master just says a word and the headband goes squeeeeze! Tsk tsk, poor Sun Wukong. She probably agreed to go on the journey so that she can have this headband removed... No, that's not true. When she was a child, the mountain might have been her entire world, but once she grew up, it wasn't enough anymore, so she went travelling to see the wide, wide world. And her journey has only just begun.

states.title: One More Nightmare
states.description:
One day, a mysterious hole opened in the fabric of the world of dreams. As holes in worlds go, this one was quite small, inconspicuous—just a lonely, dark hole.
Inside it there was a hidden room, and in that room there was a girl—another Alice, caught up in the darkest of nightmares.

states.title: One More Nightmare
states.description: She paints white roses red, without anyone's knowledge or permission—she just wants to make her favorite garden pretty. So that it is ready when someone comes to visit. So that she can be the best host there ever was. But such a day never comes, and Alice's heart breaks into dark, lonely pieces—or maybe it has already been broken long ago.

states.title: One More Nightmare
states.description:
After a long day of playing with spectres of countless nightmares, Alice falls asleep in her rose garden, just like always.
