"What a pitiful sight you are," a voice says, as a single silhouette appears by her side. With a wicked smile, the Queen of Nightmares—the one that Alice once sealed away, the one that has destroyed Alice in return—watches the girl's peaceful, sleeping face.

states.title: Bunnygirl Assassin
states.description: Tasked with an undercover mission, Elmina infiltrates an underground bar—and with her honed skill in charming people, she immediately winds all the customers around her finger. She never lets her guard down though, and whenever they try to pursue her, she replies with, "Sometimes the sweetest honey can be the deadliest poison... Remember this for later♪"

states.title: Bunnygirl Assassin
states.description: Up on the stage, it's as if Elmina has forgotten why she's here for a moment, as if she's just lost herself in the joy of dancing. Suggestive and alluring, soon she has all the eyes on her—and that's when she pinpoints her target. "You're not getting away..." she murmurs as she gives him a wink.

states.title: Bunnygirl Assassin
states.description:
Her mission accomplished, Elmina enjoys a drink. Soon enough she gets tipsy, a flush rising to her cheeks. But what comes to her mind in the moment of success is her dark past.
I will never kill again, she has promised herself. From now on, I will live saving lives, not taking them...
"I wanna get drunk tonight. Care to join me?"

states.title: Creator of the Primordial Sea
states.description:
Life has emerged from the sea, and in the sea it will meet its end.
When the great flood comes and swallows the land, the goddess will descend upon the world. Holding her pure hand up to the clear sky, she will create all life anew.

states.title: Creator of the Primordial Sea
states.description: What she deems "good" does not align with humanity's perception of the word. Her eyes look beyond—upon all beings, the world, and the universe. If humans seek to destroy the natural order, she will not hesitate to erase their civilization.

states.title: Creator of the Primordial Sea
states.description: Thus, she is by some considered a demon rather than a deity—her immeasurable generosity, pureness and virtue can at times be frightening. However, there is no ill will in her heart, only boundless love for humanity, hidden behind a merciful smile.

states.title: Twin Blades of the Round Table
states.description: A Knight of the Round Table raised by a faerie known as the Lady of the Lake—that was the original Lancelot. The path this one is walking, and the paths she refuses to follow are not the same as her predecessor's. Her mind is as open as a wide lake, her appearance and expressions ever changing like a water surface that reflects the sky. And still, just like the waters of an inland lake do not ebb and flow with the tide, so does her swordsmanship stay ever unwavering. She withstands every attack and launches her own special move. She bears the title of the strongest like it's nothing, for she is the current Lancelot.

states.title: Twin Blades of the Round Table
states.description: She is aware of the first Lancelot's sin, and of the fact that it can never be forgiven. Nevertheless, she believes that sinners aren't forbidden from doing what's right or following their principles. That's why she won't ever lay down the burden of sin she has inherited along with her name—even though it is not hers personally, she feels it is her to bear as another Lancelot.

states.title: Twin Blades of the Round Table
states.description:
Her soft, fair skin is used to pain, used to the flush it brings, and what starts as an anguished scream quickly turns coquettish.
"Ngh... Ahhh... Hiihii..."
As a blush rises to her cheeks, she notices a cold stare leveled at her.
"Ahh... Your eyes make me so... Never mind! This is just because of my curse!"

states.title: Round Table Knight of the Sun
states.description:
At dawn, a lone knight stands with his back to the rising sun, facing a hostile army. Soon he is surrounded by tens, hundreds of enemies—and yet, by the time the sun has reached the zenith, the knight is alone once again, countless bodies lying at his feet.
That was the routine for the original Gawain, the Knight of the Sun. The current one still draws her sword when the sun is the furthest from the moon, she as well a match for a thousand-man army.

states.title: Round Table Knight of the Sun
states.description:
Just like there is no rain that never stops, there is no sun that never sets. However, her—no, any Gawain's—loyalty towards their king will never wane, no matter how different each new bearer of the name is. In that sense, she is Gawain through and through.
But just like there is no sun that never sets, there can be no moon that never rises.

states.title: Round Table Knight of the Sun
states.description:
The people of Camelot love the sun. "Because it is what makes our finest knight the finest," they always say. That is, however, not entirely true—what they really love is Gawain's warm nature. Kinder and more considerate than anyone, she is just like their own sun—thus, they would call her "the Knight of the Sun" even if the source of her power lay elsewhere.
Because in the heart of the current Gawain lives the warmth of a bright, clear day.

states.title: Bride of Salvation
states.description:
Two voices echo through a quiet church.
"M-Mikaela... I'm really not made for this kind of outfit..."
"I told you it suits you, Jeanne! You're the prettiest girl in the world today!"
When the church doors creak open at last, Jeanne instantly turns her eyes to them—still bashful, but a little hopeful too.

states.title: Bride of Salvation
states.description:
Mikaela has been praying for this day to come for a long, long time. For her sweet little sister to forget her guilt—even if it's just for a day—and finally be happy.
"You have to be happy, Jeanne... Your happiness is my happiness too."

states.title: Bride of Salvation
states.description:
A blessed day ends on a grim note, as the sisters are accused of being fallen angels and imprisoned. When the Inquisitor approaches their cell, Jeanne looks at him with fear and tears shining in her eyes.
Mikaela's face, however, shows no change as she murmurs, "How long have you known?"

states.title: Angel of Celebration
states.description:
On this radiant day, Mikaela finds herself thinking—what if she had managed to avoid her fate, if she was still walking this world as a human? Would she find someone to love her too, someone to want a selfish girl like her—
"None of that! Today's Jeanne's day, and I'm going to give her a celebration she deserves!"

states.title: Angel of Celebration
states.description:
On this radiant day, Mikaela finds herself thinking—what if she had managed to avoid her fate, if she was still walking this world as a human? Would she find someone to love her too, someone to want a selfish girl like her—
"None of that! Today's Jeanne's day, and I'm going to give her a celebration she deserves!"

states.title: Angel of Celebration
states.description:
On this radiant day, Mikaela finds herself thinking—what if she had managed to avoid her fate, if she was still walking this world as a human? Would she find someone to love her too, someone to want a selfish girl like her—
"None of that! Today's Jeanne's day, and I'm going to give her a celebration she deserves!"

states.title: Red Dragon Race Queen
states.description: Oh, good, you're here! Yes, it's me, Ludmilla. Why am I wearing this outfit? Hahaha! Always with the funny questions. It's because my heart is craving speed, obviously! All right, here I go! Full throttle! The race has already started—!

states.title: Red Dragon Race Queen
states.description: The way I see it, life is a race. Tough rivals, sharp turns, steep mountain roads—you must overcome them all and reach the finish line..! Go on then, go! Set your heart free, let it blaze up the way it desires!

states.title: Red Dragon Race Queen
states.description:
Before long, Ludmilla seems to have come to her senses.
"What am I even doing...?"
Riding high after her first race, she's been frolicking around in front of her subordinates, duty and decorum completely forgotten—a far cry from her usual, hyper-disciplined self. But even as she feels remorse paint her face deep red, she murmurs, "Still, I wouldn't mind coming here again..."

states.title: Goddesses of the Sun and Moon
states.description: Apollo and Artemis, the Sun and the Moon. The fierce goddess of the arts and the pure goddess of the hunt. Different as they are from the Primordials, they are revered and feared throughout Erden.

states.title: Goddesses of the Sun and Moon
states.description: The twins couldn't be more different in disposition—one capricious, short-tempered and hard to please, the other virtuous and gentle, valuing harmony above all else. However, at their core lies what they share—their unfathomable love for each other and the wish for peace they have for the people of Erden.

states.title: Goddesses of the Sun and Moon
states.description:
"My my, don't you look grumpy today, Apollo. What happened?"
"It's nothing... Did you go see those humans again?"
"Yes, there was a conflict brewing in the mountains to the north, so I went to watch over the people there."
"...Hmph."
"Did you miss me, by any chance?"
"O-Of course not!
...You could've let me know though, is all!"

states.title: Summertime Mecha Girl
states.description: A promise to spend time with her big sister was enough to make her heart leap. She made her preparations: a swimsuit and sandals, a beach ball, waterproof coating for her machine parts, her list of 100 Things To Do At The Beach With Astri... She wasn't prepared, however, for her first encounter with the majesty of the sea. "Aegis, deploy a swim ring—I-I mean, naval shields!"

states.title: Summertime Mecha Girl
states.description:
"Today, I went to the beach with the Red Dragons. Astri said my swimsuit looked nice. It made me very happy. Astri taught me how to swim, too. I don't like water very much, but I'm not scared when I'm with Astri. Luna made Kazuto mad again, even though we were supposed to be taking it easy. I hope we can go again next year, and the year after that too... I want to make a lot of fun memories, so that I can forget the past."

—from Anya's summer vacation diary

states.title: Summertime Mecha Girl
states.description:
An annihilator and a rebel. One leaves death in her wake, the other spreads it across the land. Though like parallel lines they were never meant to meet, here and now their paths have crossed.
"My my, don't we look alike? Well, our faces do, at least."
"Yes, I think we do. Only our faces though, really. I wasn't so gifted in other areas..."
As two laughing voices drift over the pool, the night seems even more mysterious than before.

states.title: Myriadmask Aeon Lord
states.description: Dragonkin, a race descended from the Great Dragon God, has inherited its ancestor's power of transmutation—one that can change dirt into gold and turn their skin into impenetrable armor. With their horns and tails, they were often shunned by humans, but there was one village that welcomed them—a village saved thanks to their special abilities, one where the two races could peacefully coexist.

states.title: Myriadmask Aeon Lord
states.description: One day, a dragonkin girl was born in the village. Gifted with exceptional power as she was, she seemed to only destroy everything she touched, and so she became an outcast. Eventually, she got locked in a dark sanctuary, where she spent long years all alone, always gazing out of the window—as if waiting for the day a light would shine in to save her.

states.title: Myriadmask Aeon Lord
states.description: In truth, her power didn't only destroy things. Having hated herself for so long, she learned to turn into other people instead. There was but one thing she wanted in this world, one thing she tried to get back by the means of a forbidden ritual. She made countless offerings, one after another, all created by herself, from herself. But after the ritual was performed a thousand times, the attempts stopped, and she started being known as someone completely different—the one hiding behind a myriad of masks.

states.title: Plaguebearer Aeon Lord
states.description: She was created to end the Pandemonium, a being superior to all denizens of Erden. Though designed as a weapon with nothing but combat abilities, she was born as a life form with feelings. Like any newborn child, she had no sense of good and evil, as susceptible to the former as she was to the latter. Likewise, like any newborn child, there was only one thing she sought—and so, she took the scientist who created her to be her mother.

states.title: Plaguebearer Aeon Lord
states.description:
Her creator could not decide if she should be treated as a weapon or as a person until the very end. However, after Ossia died, she was resurrected by a man eternally devoted to forging arms. A woman made to be a weapon and a man only interested in weapons, both equally twisted—perhaps their paths were destined to cross.
"Who does not work shall not eat," he would always say, so she started helping with gathering materials for his creations, learning all about the world, life, and the give-and-take of trade in the process. Therefore, if there is anyone that can be called her father, surely—
"I think I've heard quite enough of these conjectures, thank you very much."

states.title: Plaguebearer Aeon Lord
states.description:
She did not rush out into the world right after the smith took her in. First, she used the uncontrolled, devastating power she was given in her first life, and the immortality that came with her second one, to repeat the cycle of self-destruction and rebirth over and over again. Throughout that time, she kept wondering if her mother's love for her was genuine or not, and if what she herself felt towards her mother was love or hate.
(Later, she came to the conclusion that it would be much better if feelings were easily classified as loss or gain, business-like and manageable.)
Answers did not come to her though, not even after she finally got her power under control. Therefore, she set out to create an even more advanced being than herself—eager to know how she would feel towards a "child" of her own.

states.title: Red Dragon Heiress
states.description: In a regal outfit befitting the occasion and the dignity of her new position, Astrid appears in the great hall, where the inauguration ceremony is held. She is the center of attention today—the one to be appointed Commander of the Red Dragon Knights. As she steps down the stairs, her movements stir a gentle breeze that plays with her long hair and coat before drifting away, carrying a flowery scent. Just a soft, faint breeze—and yet, it feels like the wind of change, ready to sweep through the country, or even the entire world.

states.title: Red Dragon Heiress
states.description: Just as expected, the dreaded question was asked during the interview: "Is there anyone special in your life?" "Duty first," she answered, but the journalist wouldn't drop the topic. Just as she finally budged and revealed what her type is, the door opened and a certain young man entered the room. "Astrid? I have the documents you asked for..." The sight of a flying teacup and spilled tea, undignified as it was, proved memorable, as later the journalist's article read, "The young Commander remains single, and yet—"

states.title: Red Dragon Heiress
states.description:
Everyone shamelessly throws their feelings at her—those who have high expectations, those who want her help, those who can't wait to see her fail. In order to withstand the pressure, to remain her resolute self, she puts on the cloak she inherited. However, even with its support, at times it still feels like the burden of responsibility is about to crush her—no matter how imposing she looks, in the end she's still a young girl. A girl that longed to be a hero who helps the weak, until she actually became one.
Sometimes even a hero needs a helping hand.

states.title: Princess in Glass Slippers
states.description: As the Princess of Fresalia, Cinderella seemed out of anyone's league. Though domineering, sharp-tongued and extravagant, she had her pride and never discriminated against anybody, regardless of their standing. For that, she was loved by everyone.

states.title: Princess in Glass Slippers
states.description: Orphaned as a small child, she grew up in a poor household, under the eye of her wicked stepmother. She was forced to do everything around the house all by herself, and wasn't allowed to go out to play. The townsfolk always frowned at the dirty rags she wore, always gave her pointed looks. She was never loved by anyone—aside from one person.

states.title: Princess in Glass Slippers
states.description:
The thing she was eventually overcome by was not a spell or a curse, but the same lung disease that took her father. Her body shaken by violent coughs, her throat burning, her eyes blurry, she felt that the dream she once told her father about—her dream to go to the ball at the castle—was slipping right through her fingers.
That is when a small hand knocked on her door.

states.title: Princess of Thorns
states.description:
Once upon a time, in the northernmost part of Erden, there was a kingdom called Fresalia. Small as it was, it had significant influence over its neighbors, thanks to its formidable royal couple.
And Talia—Sleeping Beauty—was their only child.

states.title: Princess of Thorns
states.description:
Her childhood was marked by strict discipline and thorough schooling—in addition to regular education, she had to master etiquette, the art of socializing, and all the other skills that make a proper princess. She was never allowed to play with her peers, and didn't have a single friend. She saw herself as something akin to a doll rather than a human, and in an act of self-torment she made dolls in her free time. However, they were all taken from her too.
She was alway all alone—that is, until a certain girl came into her life.

states.title: Princess of Thorns
states.description:
With her forbidden power, she made the flow of time in the kingdom stop for long, long years—until the entire country was covered with thorns. It was better this way. This way, she could be with her friend forever and ever and—
However, after a while, little rips started showing in the fabric of her dreamscape, and little by little the cogs of reality that she'd halted started to stir. Just as she was about to lose all hope, a girl appeared in front of her—a shadowy being roaming around the world of dreams.

states.title: Angel of the Sleepless City
states.description: A city where the lights seem to never go out, with countless buildings crammed together, and a sea of people as far as the eye can see. A place she doesn't know, customs she doesn't understand. Illuminated by flashing neon lights in every color imaginable, she felt more afraid than in the depths of the blackest, moonless night. That is, until she saw it. An elegant form and a roaring engine resonating with the beat of her heart. Speed like nothing she ever experienced in her own world, the thrill of outrunning the wind. It was called "a motorcycle," they told her. Once she got on, the city didn't seem so threatening anymore, and she found out just how addictive speed can be.

states.title: Angel of the Sleepless City
states.description:
After losing so much, she finally gained something—a new life. She decided to spend it atoning for her sins. Having parted ways with the other Finn, she started surveying the city for any remaining undead, to prevent this world from ending up the way her own had.
He thinks she should stop blaming herself.
He thinks she should enjoy herself more. After all, life shouldn't be lived for the past, but for the present and the future.
Her co-workers in this new world seem to understand that, though, so he thinks she should be all right, in the end.
"Yo, Endless! Let's hit the pool next!"

states.title: Angel of the Sleepless City
states.description: After bidding farewell to the ones she held dear, she was assigned duty as the Primordial of Death's Avatar: collecting souls that didn't die properly. She was to lead the undead, ghosts, all those who couldn't move on due to the unnatural circumstances of their death, towards the proper end. It made her wonder: can she, a person reborn with undead powers, live properly? Can she ever meet a proper death? Who has she become? The answers will come with time. She doesn't know it yet, but after she defeated the Fullmetal Knight and countless other evildoers that prowl the city's streets every night, after she saved numerous lives time and time again, people started calling her "the Undead Savior of Shinjuku".

states.title: Red Dragon Sisters
states.description:
After the incident with Alastor, with all the misunderstandings and distrust between Ludmilla and Clarice cleared, their paths merged together again. Ludmilla couldn't be happier about that development.
However, the ten years they spent apart were still a gaping wound in Clarice's heart.

states.title: Red Dragon Sisters
states.description:
Seeing Ludmilla find reliable companions and sense of fulfilment at the Academy, Clarice couldn't help but wonder—
Maybe Ludmilla has forgotten all about the time they spent together as children.
Maybe she would be happier if Clarice disappeared from her life for good.

states.title: Red Dragon Sisters
states.description:
When she learned how Ludmilla really felt, Clarice cried all night long.
"So you've always kept me close to your heart, Miss..."
Unable to get back the ten years she already lost, she resolved that she would devote her next ten years to Ludmilla and Ludmilla alone.
"I will never let us be apart again, Miss...!"

states.title: Sorceress of Time
states.description: After the Gru Grim were defeated, Rolotia parted ways with the Red Dragon Knights and set off to roam the world in her new, human form. And though she finally had the freedom she longed for back when she was confined to the Temple, deep in her heart there was a wound, an aching void she could not fill.

states.title: Sorceress of Time
states.description:
She promised herself she would never use time reversal magic again. It is no wonder then that she felt nervous when Chronos herself ordered her to do so. And so, with the weight of the past and the future on her shoulders...she stammered during the incantation. Badly. And the botched spell had a noticeable effect on her body.
"Th-This isn't how it was supposed to work..."

states.title: Sorceress of Time
states.description: She went nine years back in time, and the boy she met then reminded her of him—his hunger for strength, admiration for heroes, deeply hidden kindness... She wanted to protect the boy from this cruel world and even crueler time. For the sake of the one she failed to save in the past.

states.title: Dazzling White Bride
states.description:
If she had met the seven dwarfs, if she had eaten the poisoned apple, if she had fallen into eternal sleep, she might have ended up being "her".
Instead, she met an awkward mother and a fantasy prone little sister, she shared warm, hearty meals with them—and yet, a tragedy still struck, although the one who never woke up wasn't her, but someone she held dear. The one who helped her was a true prince, as strong as he was kind—that still happened, too.
A little bit different, a little bit the same; Snow White and "Snow White"—
Unlike the fairy tale, Snow's story is going to continue past "they lived happily ever after."

states.title: Dazzling White Bride
states.description:
Snow Black despised the Prince who saved Snow White from her dark influence. She watched them act all lovey-dovey, even though she was right there, inside—and her patience was running out. So, she put her plan into motion: she separated the pair, and by keeping the Prince to herself, she stripped Snow White of all hope. But that was only the surface. Deep inside, Snow Black also had feelings for—
"As if! I just wanted to take away everything Snow White ever loved!" she claims, but even in her anger, her face seems even more fickle than before.

states.title: Dazzling White Bride
states.description:
As Snow Black has changed, so has her relationship with Snow White.
There are still things they won't compromise on, things they won't forgive each other. However, Snow White has learned to smile at the way Snow Black has changed under Finn's influence, to see her as a sister who just cannot be honest about her feelings; meanwhile, Snow Black started to remark on the lack of progress in Snow White's relationship with Finn, like one would when annoyed at a sibling's awkwardness.
They still fail to meet halfway most of the time, but it might not take that long for their icy bond to thaw.

states.title: Ebony Black Bride
states.description: Whatever you do, do not ask her where she got that dress. It's the surest way to put her in a nasty mood. She won't ever admit it, but the dress looks just like the one she got from him—the person who once was her real family, even if only in a dream.

states.title: Ebony Black Bride
states.description: Whatever you do, do not ask her where she got that dress. It's the surest way to put her in a nasty mood. She won't ever admit it, but the dress looks just like the one she got from him—the person who once was her real family, even if only in a dream.

states.title: Ebony Black Bride
states.description: Whatever you do, do not ask her where she got that dress. It's the surest way to put her in a nasty mood. She won't ever admit it, but the dress looks just like the one she got from him—the person who once was her real family, even if only in a dream.

states.title: Demon Queen of the 6th Heaven
states.description: When the fierce Nobunaga was born, her future realm was still a lawless, violent place. With oni and samurai drifting from the central part of the country, and bandits running rampant, there was not much space for the peaceful folk to settle.

states.title: Demon Queen of the 6th Heaven
states.description:
One day, a first-rate samurai wandering the world—Nobunaga's father—arrived in the area. Unable to just watch the disarray in silence, he built a castle and devoted his life to establishing law and order in the land.
At one point, his path crossed with a young woman from a nearby town, and so he was blessed with a daughter.

states.title: Demon Queen of the 6th Heaven
states.description:
Due to her tendency to bizarre behavior, growing up Nobunaga gained a reputation as "the Fool". She was nothing like her mild-tempered parents, and found the peace that had settled over the area boring. The conflict she desired came unexpectedly, brought about by a local commoner's betrayal—oni ringleaders were let into the town, and within one night the streets filled up with corpses. Nobunaga's father fell trying to defend the townsfolk, and her mother perished protecting her daughter from the attackers.
And so, from that day on, Nobunaga became a demon herself—a fierce spirit of revenge.

states.title: Flame-Catching Streamer
states.description:
"Hello, my Honnos!☆" is her chosen way to start a stream. 150,000 is her subscriber count. Getting flamed in the comments is her speciality, and her efficiency rate in putting out her own fires stands at an astonishing 0%...
Why does it always happen to her? Who knows. It's always a surprise, and it always makes her fall apart in an instant. And then it happens again, in no more than two days! It's just one of life's great mysteries.
She's a singer, she's a streamer, she's a legend—she's Honnoji!

states.title: Flame-Catching Streamer
states.description: Honnoji was already a pretty popular singer and dancer when she debuted as a songwriter with "Dark Clown Smiles" (currently unavailable to the public), a work absolutely overflowing with the essence of youth. It wasn't received well, though—its cringeworthy lyrics and overall low quality earned Honnoji a barrage of criticism and a crushing blow to her self-esteem. However, her trademark casual charm was met with a warmer reception in a later release titled "Honnoji! Revolution," and little by little her subscriber count started to grow.

states.title: Flame-Catching Streamer
states.description:
Growing up, Honnoji didn't go to school much—she was scared to talk to her classmates and not very good at studying, so she preferred to just stay in her room all day, every day.
And then, one day, she discovered Evertube—a place where everyone, introvert and extrovert alike, could express themselves however they liked. "Maybe this is the place for me," Honnoji thought, as she took her first hesitant steps into the world.

states.title: Dreamy Magical Girl
states.description: Alice was a clumsy, mediocre student at the Magic Academy, until one day she found a wounded, rabbit-like animal lying by the roadside. She treated it with a healing spell—the only type of magic she was any good at—and the creature perked up immediately. It turned out to be a familiar of the God of Sleep. She gave Alice her thanks, along with a very special power.

states.title: Dreamy Magical Girl
states.description:
Thanks to the creature's gift, Alice became a first-rate magical girl, capable of using any kind of magic she could think of, though for a limited time only.
True to her kind heart, she used her new powers to help people. She went to school by day and fought monsters by night—and before she knew it, she gained quite a reputation. They called her a superhero—one who appears when all hope is lost.

states.title: Dreamy Magical Girl
states.description:
Once an outcast, for the first time in her life Alice felt appreciated and needed—and that made her heart overflow with happiness.
She didn't realize, however, that great power always comes at a great price.

states.title: Dreamy Familiar
states.description: A rabbit-like little creature, as mysterious as she's cute. She understands human speech, and can even say a couple of words herself. Though at first glance she might look helpless, her tiny body hides incredibly powerful magic.

states.title: Swordmaster Bride
states.description: A pure white dress seems appropriate for this Lancelot—an honest young woman so unlike her ancestor, a man steeped in suspicion and rage. Keen on—that is, accustomed to pain and battle-hardened as she is, she can't help but feel anxious about wearing a wedding outfit.

states.title: Swordmaster Bride
states.description:
When the Knights of the Round Table were asked to choose one member to model a wedding dress, the king passed the task on to Gawain, and Gawain—to Lancelot. "This kind of thing is not exactly what I'm into..." she protested, but when she tried to find someone else to do it, all the other knights were mysteriously absent.
When Gawain, haunted by her guilty conscience, went to the photoshoot venue later, she found Lancelot entangled in the ribbons decorating the place, with a deep flush on her face.

states.title: Swordmaster Bride
states.description:
After Gawain reprimanded Lancelot for not taking the task seriously and left, the king herself appeared at the venue to check on her subordinate's progress.
"Huff, huff... Ah, Your Majesty. Um, I got tangled in these decorative chains somehow... Nghh! Could you perhaps help me...?" Lancelot implored, but the king, well aware and understanding of her preferences, just closed the door silently.
Though it might not appear so from the way she looks now, left alone and breathless in the wedding hall, for anyone who knows her it is clear that the upright and honest Lancelot, always ready to meet any challenges life throws her way, would surely make a wonderful bride.

states.title: Ruler of the Round Table
states.description:
In Camelot, the Knights of the Round Table inherit their names from generation to generation, along with their curse. The third King Arthur, known as Arthur Leidram, was no exception.
Armed with her sacred sword, she dominated every battlefield she appeared on—and no one could tell if what she'd set her sights on was a world of peace or one of ruin.

states.title: Ruler of the Round Table
states.description: She didn't turn evil, not exactly—she merely revealed who she had always been deep down. A ruthless absolute monarch. She'll stop at nothing to achieve her goals, and now that she has obtained the power to bend anything and everything to her will, she is sure to take the shortest path to make a new world—her new world—become reality.

states.title: Ruler of the Round Table
states.description:
It's as if King Arthur—no, even young Leidram—always knew it would come to this conclusion. If so, was there ever any meaning to her tears, her affection? What thoughts did she keep in her heart when she took her place at the Round Table?
Her crime and punishment spreads out far, towards the violent "selection" that will shape humankind's future.

states.title: Full-Throttle Racer
states.description:
At a sunlit race course, the spectators' eyes are not on the state-of-the-art cars lining the pits, but on a certain silver-haired woman—one fitting the role of a race queen so seamlessly, you would never guess her day job is a maid.
Head to toe in cool blue to complement Ludmilla's deep red, Clarice stands by her mistress's side, and the venue bursts into deafening applause.

states.title: Full-Throttle Racer
states.description:
As a matter of fact, today Clarice is neither a maid, nor a race queen—she's a driver, and she's here to win. The way her heart resonates with the engine of her car from the moment the green flag is waved, and the breakneck back-and-forth with other competitors... For her, racing is just like love.
She won't stop her car or let her heart slow down, no matter what—not until the victory is hers.

states.title: Full-Throttle Racer
states.description:
Racing doesn't end when you cross the finish line; every driver has their own race that keeps going. To make sure they win next time. To move forward, as far as possible. To reunite with the person they miss.
Clarice's heart doesn't stop racing once she's cut the engine, either. Is it because of her mistress, or maybe—
The answer is waiting for her at her destination.

states.title: Summertime Fallen Angel
states.description:
They say a savior has descended from the heavens to shine light on wicked deeds and help the needy of the northern lands—one called Saint Jeanne.
Little do they know, however, that there is another, not so radiant Jeanne living here in Erden as well.

states.title: Summertime Fallen Angel
states.description:
She remembers the flames consuming her body just as well as she remembers the abuse hurled at her by the same people she had once saved.
Even after she was reborn, the deep wounds in Jeanne's heart remained, preventing her from letting her guard down with anyone.

states.title: Summertime Fallen Angel
states.description: The mysterious boy who granted her her second life wanted her to join the fight to decide the fate of his world. That plan failed, though—crippled by fear and distrust, Jeanne was in no shape to fight any battles. She withdrew to a ruined church in a remote region, devoted as ever to the very god who had forsaken her.

states.title: Priestess of the Sun
states.description:
A long time ago, a woman descended from the sky into a wild, unexplored part of Erden. She promised herself that she would live there doing nothing. However, one day she met the native inhabitants of the land—a nation weak and simple, yet gentle and peaceful at heart.
She gave them the rice plant she brought with her from her birthplace. She taught them how to cultivate it. She brought rain to end droughts.
They saw her power and revered her, and soon she was known as their "Lady Himiko."

states.title: Priestess of the Sun
states.description: Her people don't know that she makes the rain fall not with prayer, but with brute force. That the age she told them she was actually converted from her actual age into something more acceptable by Erden's standards. But they know how much she cares for them, and when they see how gloomily she stares at the sky sometimes, they know her homeland must be far, far away.

states.title: Priestess of the Sun
states.description:
Long before she was known as "Himiko," she tried to protect everything—but in the end, she couldn't even save her home planet. When she met her current subjects, she was still grieving over that loss.
She doesn't try to keep everything safe anymore, she just swore she'd do everything in her power to protect them—the people who gave her a new name and somewhere to belong.
No matter what happens to the place they live in now, as long as she has them, she can make anywhere her home.

states.title: White Rabbit Princess
states.description:
"Kaguya, the Shining Princess" is what everyone called her, quite fittingly for such a radiant beauty. A never-ending line of suitors vied for her attention every day.
She rejected them all, though—all because of the dark secret she was hiding.

states.title: White Rabbit Princess
states.description:
Her body contained a deadly toxin developed in order to wipe out all intelligent life on Erden, and she was created with the sole purpose of delivering it to its target. Her beauty was supposed to captivate as many human men as possible, and they in turn were supposed to become the next carriers of the toxin.
However, the plan failed. Kaguya didn't want anyone on Erden to get hurt, so she decided to prevent that by avoiding human contact altogether.

states.title: White Rabbit Princess
states.description:
And so, out of the kindness of her heart, she chose to distance herself from everybody. Life of solitude didn't mean peace of mind, though—she spent countless sleepless nights tormented by loneliness, desperately trying not to cry or scream.
The person who found her right after she had landed on Erden gave her her name—Kaguya, meaning, "may your path shine bright." May you never know darkness or loneliness again.
Perhaps that wish was the reason why years later fate brought her together with a person capable of setting her free.

states.title: Goddess of All Laws
states.description: Among the many gods of Asgard, Odin is known as the supreme deity, one who's been around ever since the world's conception. Her "Eye of All Laws," bestowed on her by the wise Mímir, perceives all and inspires awe in those caught in its gaze.

states.title: Goddess of All Laws
states.description:
She is always calm, collected, and magnanimous. Even during Ragnarok, the war that almost destroyed this world long years ago, she would never miss her afternoon tea time.
After the war came to an end, she solemnly handed out forgiveness to those who deserved it, and eternal punishment to those who did not. And sometimes, she would even let them see her smile.

states.title: Goddess of All Laws
states.description: She tirelessly pursued all knowledge she had yet to know, every sight she had yet to see. Endlessly watched every conceivable place, time period, dimension. And after millenia of observing all possible phenomena and rules, she finally felt it—the feeling she's been unconsciously denying this whole time, one that has actually been consuming her all along.

states.title: Bringer of Bad Omens
states.description: Odin's raven servants. When seen flocking together in the night, they bode disaster and strike fear into people's hearts.

states.title: Bringer of Bad Omens
states.description: Odin's raven servants. When seen flocking together in the night, they bode disaster and strike fear into people's hearts.

states.title: Bringer of Bad Omens
states.description: Odin's raven servants. When seen flocking together in the night, they bode disaster and strike fear into people's hearts.

states.title: Goddess of Lies and Betrayal
states.description: She's been around since ancient times, but not a single person has ever truly known her. She comes and goes as she pleases, changes appearances on a whim, and always keeps her cards close to her chest. Some say that even the form everyone knows as "Loki" is actually fake.

states.title: Goddess of Lies and Betrayal
states.description: One theory claims she is not fully divine, but the child of a cursed giant and a god. Her unwillingness to settle down is supposed to stem from the fact that she feels like she doesn't belong with either of her parents' races—or anywhere, for that matter.

states.title: Goddess of Lies and Betrayal
states.description: She doesn't really interact with other gods. Even if she were to talk to them, it would just lead to more lies and boredom, she seems to think. However, there is one deity she can have an engaging conversation with—in the presence of the supreme ruler of Asgard, Loki is just like an innocent child enjoying a chat with a friend.

states.title: Radiant Mecha Bride
states.description: As her moment in the spotlight approached, Anya was reminded of her lonely past—long days spent on the verge of death in a hospital bed, with only the hope to see her sister again keeping her alive.

states.title: Radiant Mecha Bride
states.description: When Anya finally stepped into the white wedding venue, her eyes were immediately drawn to the silhouette of Astrid standing by the altar. Dressed in an exquisite outfit, she radiated sheer beauty that simply took Anya's breath away. And when Astrid noticed her in turn, the same stunned admiration was reflected on her face too.

states.title: Radiant Mecha Bride
states.description: She didn't know what expression she should make—she'd never had to play a role for the camera before, and her face simply froze. However, when she saw a shy smile on her sister's face, she remembered she was not alone anymore. That it was okay to just enjoy this moment of happiness.

states.title: The Last Pharaoh
states.description:
Once, she had it all.
She was born in the Kingdom of Kemet, a land favored by the great river, blessed with rich, black soil—just like she was blessed with an abundance of talents. She didn't let herself rely solely on her gifts, though, but used them to gain as much knowledge as possible. Unmatched in skill, she was more than qualified to take on any number of duties. However, there was only one role she had her eyes on...

states.title: The Last Pharaoh
states.description:
Once, she lost all she had.
She was too brilliant for her own good. Those she devoted her life to turned their backs on her, those she thought loyal suddenly sang a different tune—and they crushed her love under their feet. Seeking death, she turned to venom, but what she ended up embracing was deadlier than any toxin—lethal enough, in fact, to leave death behind and receive eternity. And it was with venom that she then purged her beloved, poisoned country.

states.title: The Last Pharaoh
states.description:
Once, she offered up all she had left.
"Let me dedicate all my talents to you. Utilize all my knowledge to serve you. No one else is worthy of my devotion, my trust... If that's not love, then what is it?
My one and only, my beloved—my country."
After all, she's only ever had eyes for one role—that of a queen. And she has the whole eternity to perform it.

states.title: Lion Queen of the Desert
states.description:
There once was a girl from the slums. Everything she had had been taken from her—her parents, her home, all her possessions. Until one day, she was finally given something; a gift quite unexpected and unique—the crown.
She could have stopped at being a figurehead. It would have been enough to provide her with everything she'd always lacked, and more. But she chose to become a genuine queen instead.

states.title: Lion Queen of the Desert
states.description:
And so fortune smiled on the girl, and she inherited the throne. But the throne was just a vessel for greatness. The effort made to fill it, the time spent tirelessly pushing forward in order to be recognized as a true queen—that was all her.
Soon enough, her domain echoed with voices praising her. But she didn't rest on her laurels. She kept on learning and improving herself, all to see the ones who had recognized her as their queen smile.

states.title: Lion Queen of the Desert
states.description:
Why did she become the queen in the first place?
It was because of the stories she heard after she managed to escape the kill-or-be-killed reality of the slums—stories of heroes who always helped those in need. For a long time, they were the only bright spots in her dark life, like a cluster of shining stars no one could steal from her. But she was pragmatic, so she knew stars were miles and miles away. Unreachable.
And then she heard about the claim she had to the throne, and in that moment she immediately knew that it was her chance to finally aim for the starry sky.

states.title: Cerulean Bride
states.description:
The sunlight pouring into the chapel makes all the whites even brighter as Rizette looks up at her intended, slightly taller than her even though she's wearing high heels. She can feel everyone gently watching over her—her beloved little brother who walked her down the aisle, her companions who fought by her side on countless battlefields...
She hears the big question, "Do you?" and the answer is so obvious, has been for ages, really. And as the bells start ringing, she thinks to herself that it all feels like a dream.

states.title: Cerulean Bride
states.description: She doesn't notice it really is a dream, not until an unexpected visitor points it out—another Rizette, dressed in black, visibly angry at the one who dreamed up this happy world. "It's not fair that only you get to have this," that Rizette says. But she drives away all the evil things lurking around nevertheless. Perplexed, Rizette in white can't help but ask, "Have you come to destroy my dream, or to protect it?"

states.title: Cerulean Bride
states.description:
"I came to interrupt this dream. But I won't let anyone else touch it," Rizette in black answers. She knows how precious this fantasy is better than anyone else—she's learned the hard way that being able to be by your loved one's side is the greatest of miracles. And so, she tries giving the other Rizette a push in the right direction.
"Go, make this dream come true in the real world."

states.title: The Great Menace, Hell's Equal
states.description:
Heralded by a roar of laughter, a golden-haired girl appears in the moonlight. She holds Ruyi Bang in her hand and wears Jinguer on her head...but she is not Sun Wukong. She is a different troublemaker, born from within Wukong. Her name is Vajra.
For you see, a girl with a dangerous mix of Yin and Yang personalities was once abandoned on Mount Huaguo...

states.title: The Great Menace, Hell's Equal
states.description:
When the Monkey God took Wukong in, he was well aware of the two personalities dwelling in her. And so, he didn't only raise one of them, he raised both.
When Vajra finally emerged, she could wield Ruyi Bang, fly Nimbus, and use Monkey God's techniques just as well as Wukong could—because she trained just as hard, though hidden the whole time.

states.title: The Great Menace, Hell's Equal
states.description:
Born of Yin energy, Vajra is far more selfish than Wukong, and tries to make anyone she takes a liking to her servant. Still, just because she is Yin-aligned doesn't mean she is evil. She would never turn her back on those who are lonely or left behind, and cares for all her "servants" more than any other "master."
It seems that when the Monkey God decided to share one of the many names he is known under, Vajrang Bali, with her, he also gifted her with some of his best qualities.

states.title: Ruler of the Dragon Palace
states.description:
The young lady of the Dragon Palace leads her people as skilfully as she can lead their traditional dance. You would be ill-advised to praise her for accomplishing so much at such a young age, though—unless you want to become the next target of her exceptionally sharp tongue.
Because you see, she despises nothing more than being considered a child.

states.title: Ruler of the Dragon Palace
states.description:
She is sharp in performing her duties as well, always making sure the residents of her domain are safe and provided with sufficient amount of dream pieces to sustain themselves. However, when faced with unforeseen situations, she tends to get overwhelmed and freeze up.
No matter how much she pushes herself to act mature, she's still a child in some respects—but her subjects love that side of her too.

states.title: Ruler of the Dragon Palace
states.description:
Why did she assume such a responsible role at her age in the first place? Because she wanted to earn her mother and father's recognition. Her subordinates know that all too well, just like they know that they cannot replace her parents. All they can do is stay by her side and watch out for any danger.
What they don't realize is that it's thanks to them that Otohime can be the proud ruler she is today.

states.title: Black Rose of Fresalia
states.description:
If Cinderella never met her fairy godmother, if she stayed at the ball past midnight, if she lost her best friend, if, if, if—
She doesn't wait for someone to grant her happiness, she reaches out and takes it for herself. She doesn't bother with promises, she just chooses whichever option looks interesting at the moment.
"And if anyone threatens Talia, I will crush them, no matter who or what they are."

states.title: Black Rose of Fresalia
states.description:
Once she wrapped herself in darkness, she tried to act accordingly. However, despite the fact that on the surface she seemed to have turned sadistic, at heart she was still the same kind girl she'd been before. Even when she was about to take away another person's power, she was courteous enough to explain the risks and get their consent.
The truth is, when she embraced darkness, she was secretly a bit happy that she was going to match her best friend now.

states.title: Black Rose of Fresalia
states.description:
Cinderella's mother neglected her. She treated her like a servant and didn't spare a single thought even when she fell gravely ill. But Cinderella is different. No matter how tempting the darkness might be, no matter how dirty her hands might get, she would never stoop that low.
Because the only reason she reached for power beyond her own caliber was to save someone dear to her.

states.title: Guardian of the Underworld
states.description:
The self-proclaimed "future Ruler of Hell" was in fact just a gatekeeper. She was fired, however, and after trying to find her place for a little while, she became a Red Dragon Knight... Well, to be more precise, a Red Dragon Squire.
"Hey!!! I wasn't fired! I quit!"
Oh, and her dog ears? They're fake.

states.title: Guardian of the Underworld
states.description:
After springing into existence, she immediately had two fated encounters: first with a dog—a creature destined to become her arch-nemesis—and then with a boy who came to her rescue.
Convinced that what's scary to her must also be scary to others, she dons dog ears in order to give herself a menacing aura. And as for the boy, she keeps the memory of their meeting safe in her heart.

states.title: Guardian of the Underworld
states.description:
Haunted by the Pandemonium, natural disasters and numerous wars, Erden has lost countless lives. And so, people clung to hope that their departed loved ones might find peace in the afterlife—one after another, the survivors wished for salvation after death.
Eventually, from the earnestness of their wishes, a new Primordial was born.

states.title: Red Dragon of the East
states.description:
In her life, Ludmilla's shared a bond with countless people. A lot of them were other knights—the superiors who taught her ins and outs of being a knight, the subordinates she taught in turn, the comrades she felt at ease with. All these bonds made her stronger, but at the same time...
As a matter of fact, the outfit she's wearing right now was obtained due to a certain bond too.

states.title: Red Dragon of the East
states.description:
Some of the bonds she established were severed, despite her best efforts.
She was a knight and so were they. Protectors of their country, they were no strangers to conflict. She trained them to protect each other too, but still, she couldn't stop their blood from being spilled. 
She thinks of them as she looks outside, wishing that at least the extraordinary snowy landscape before her would stay forever unchanged.

states.title: Red Dragon of the East
states.description:
Bonds hold special meaning in Eastland. Once forged, they might loosen, but will never break, unless one decides to cut them. Even after death, the ties one's established will carry on into the next life, and the one after that.
And sometimes, old bonds give birth to new ones. Determined not to lose a comrade ever again, Ludmilla devoted herself to training, and soon, one after another, like-minded knights started gathering around her for leadership.

states.title: Forsaken Round Table Knight
states.description:
A black castle tower looms over a remote island in the middle of the open sea, marking the place of exile of the disgraced Knights of the Round Table.
Normally, a prison would be rife with foul words and even fouler deeds, but here, there are none. Because from the very beginning, the one keeping this place in order was Percival, a knight recognized for his sense of justice by King Arthur himself.
The current Percival, the third warden of the prison, is just as dedicated to upholding justice, and just as feared by the inmates.

states.title: Forsaken Round Table Knight
states.description: Dedicated to her mission as she was, after spending years under the constant stream of insults from her prisoners, Percival's composure finally snapped. "I'm a Knight of the Round Table, aren't I? And yet I haven't even seen the Round Table once! All I do is sit here and deal with criminals, day in, day out... I'm doing a good job, right? Right!?" "Can someone please praise me...?"

states.title: Forsaken Round Table Knight
states.description:
Spending most of her time in a place where she couldn't ask anyone for praise, she suffered in silence, hoping that one day a special someone would arrive and spoil her rotten.
Once the suitable person, already familiar with her fellow knights, appeared on the island and had a chance to get to know her, he came to the following, inevitable conclusion.
"The Round Table certainly has a lot of unique individuals in its ranks."

states.title: Rebel of the Round Table
states.description:
The girl is defiant. Her name is listed among the Knights of the Round Table, but she has no intention of serving any ruler. If she ever meets King Arthur again, she will immediately go for the kill.
The girl is unfilial. The first Mordred was her grandfather, but she couldn't care less about the remorse he felt. She only wishes she could have slain him herself.
The girl is a rebel, and she's determined to take on the entire damned world.

states.title: Rebel of the Round Table
states.description:
Mordred's curse makes its bearers weak to sunlight. In return, they can gain strength by sucking other people's blood.
Bonds of blood helped keep the Round Table unified over the years. Is it a surprise, then, that the knight inclined to steal blood ended up exiled and forsaken?

states.title: Rebel of the Round Table
states.description:
Through her window in her white room, a girl looks up at the clear sky, wondering what fun is waiting for her today. She hears her mother calling her, and when she follows the voice downstairs, she sees her beloved family and a delicious meal waiting for her—
Mordred was never allowed to have any of that. Through her window in her dark cell, she glares at the gloomy sky, wondering how to survive another day.

states.title: Lakeside Reverie
states.description: The new season brings along sleepy warmth—but the earthy smell of plants and the early summer breeze tickling Talia's skin tell her this is not a dream. She hears a voice calling her name, and when she turns around, she sees Cinderella. She calls her best friend back, like she always does, and hurries to her side, relieved to know that the world around her is indeed the real one.

states.title: Lakeside Reverie
states.description:
Lanterns rise up to the night sky, carrying the hopes of those who lit them. Nightmare Beauty looks at them and wonders why people wish for things beyond their reach, as if her own past had faded from her memory.
"Sometimes the dreams you thought were unattainable do come true. And since a miracle like that has already happened here, I think my work is done. Even so... Would you mind if I came to see you every now and then, on a fleeting summer night?"

states.title: Lakeside Reverie
states.description: "For both me and the other me to be here at the same time—it must be a summer night's dream. Still, Cinderella, I want you to know that you're just as loved when only one me is around. Because my feelings for you would be enough for two people. I—we—care for you more than anyone in the world, please remember that, okay? That is one thing I know no one can beat me at, hehe."

states.title: Lady of the Tower
states.description:
In her tower in the woods, Rapunzel is waiting for her soulmate. She doesn't know his name nor his face, but she knows she is bound to meet him one day. She lets her lovely song unfold from the top of her tower, wishing he would hurry up and find her already.
When Rapunzel's true love finally arrives, perhaps her long, beautiful hair will act as the hand of fate, bringing them together at last.

states.title: Lady of the Tower
states.description:
She often climbs to the top of her tower. The night sky seems so close from there... But she still can't reach the stars, and with the additional distance from the ground, she feels even more lonely than usual; painfully aware that she won't be leaving this place, not today.
She wonders if her beloved stars watch her sometimes, just like she watches them.

states.title: Lady of the Tower
states.description:
She counts the stars over and over again. She's always yearned for the night sky, even though the ground is so much closer, solid and true. Once she's done counting, she lies down, but sleep tends to evade her, so she escapes into one of her usual reveries.
"Isn't it odd? I may not know your face, but I would recognize your scent and the warmth of your embrace anywhere..."

states.title: Master of Treachery
states.description:
She was a girl with no name, just a number carved into her skin. Until one day she killed the adults that chained her, burned the walls that confined her, destroyed everything that stood in her way to freedom.
She did whatever she needed to stay alive, and threw away what she didn't need anymore without hesitation. And people called it duplicity, they called it betrayal. Before she knew it, she had gained a name, and the name had gained notoriety.
Perhaps the number on her skin has been an evil omen from the start...

states.title: Master of Treachery
states.description:
She doesn't have any positive emotions left now, but she used to have them once. She used to have someone she cared about.
Lü Bu often thinks about the girl who shared her fate as a child; wonders where she might be now, what she's doing these days... Constant enemy attacks have left her with no illusions, though—with too many betrayals on her record, Lü Bu doesn't have anywhere to go anymore.
Except for the land across the sea.

states.title: Master of Treachery
states.description:
"What if I had been the one who got on the boat that day? What if the two of us had got onto it together...?"
Away from the hustle and bustle of the world, in a place hidden from the constant struggle of her life, Lü Bu indulges in what-ifs. Dreamlike lotus flowers embrace her gently, their petals fresh and unfaded, like the deepest corners of her heart.

states.title: Oni Slayer
states.description:
She was a girl with no name and no memory of her past. A certain samurai found her washed up on the shore and gave her the name Musashi, along with his own surname, Miyamoto. In return, she called him "Master." She mimicked his techniques in a naive, earnest way, befitting a child with no past to rely on.
She made new memories every day, while the old ones stayed forgotten.

states.title: Oni Slayer
states.description: A certain girl calls Musashi by a number. She is surrounded by scary adults, with nowhere to run, nowhere to hide— "You get lost in dreams as easily as in the waking world, kid," her master's words used to wake her from her nightmares, his smile soothing her fears. And now, he has left her too, gone where she cannot follow, before she could gain the full mastery of his teachings. Luckily, he left behind The Book of Five Rings, a treatise to guide her steps.

states.title: Oni Slayer
states.description: The Book of Five Rings contained the arcana of the Dual Heaven Style swordsmanship. When Musashi first heard that its ultimate secret is emptiness, she stated that she already had nothing. But her master said it's not simply about the lack of things, it's about the lack of fixed existence. He added that in order to attain it, she'll need to confront her past one day. And so, Musashi forges ahead, determined to face what she's lost and what lies ahead of her.

states.title: Seaside Monarch
states.description:
Dusk was gathering across the sandy beach, mingling light with darkness. The waves were low, as if groveling, and even the sea breeze had gone quiet as the ruler of the Round Table took a leisurely walk.
Her mind wandering, she realized she had never been to the seaside before, even though Camelot had access to the sea. Watching the waves break on the shore and retreat only to come back again, she thought about her past and her future.
"It is quite pleasant here, I must admit."

states.title: Seaside Monarch
states.description:
A familiar figure appeared over Kay, blocking out the sun and his view of the clear skies. Judging by the menacing aura he could sense, he concluded that it must be his former king, changed after obtaining the power of Avalon. And then, the figure spoke.
"Don't you think you have slept enough, brother?"
Kay jerked awake, shaken by what he had witnessed in his dream."Stop meddling with people's heads, you blasted incubus..." he mumbled to himself before closing his eyes again.

states.title: Seaside Monarch
states.description: The Knights of the Round Table were spending one of their rare days off at the royal swimming pool—Kay lounging under a beach umbrella, Gawain devouring a generous serving of fried noodles, Lancelot preparing to take a dive from the springboard, and Gareth floating idly in her swim ring. At one point, they all noticed the absence of their king, only to spot her swimming gracefully a short distance away. When she reached their end of the pool, four hands stretched out in her direction, offering to help her get out of the water. And though it might have been a trick of the summer sun, the knights could swear that in that moment her face was brightened by a smile.

states.title: Twin Horrors
states.description: In a small, remote village, there once lived twin sisters—one curious and bright, but sickly, the other caring and helpful, but easily scared. They led a quiet life, doted on by the village residents. Until one day, a certain man appeared in their house, and a dreadful incident occurred.

states.title: Twin Horrors
states.description: Frankenstein was born with a heart disease, which made any kind of physical effort a serious risk to her life. But her feeble body harbored tremendous magical power—a threat of entirely different sort, lurking within her like a monster. Mary feared that power and always kept a close watch over her sister.

states.title: Twin Horrors
states.description: The local official sent to investigate the twins' house after the incident described it with these words: "The first thing I noticed was the indescribable smell. I held my nose as I walked in, and what I saw inside was... It was hell. I've never seen anything so ghastly in my life."

states.title: Guardian Angel on Strings
states.description:
Not so long ago, Mary took her frail, sickly sister and ran away from their monstrous father. The twins settled in a small, remote village, and thought they'd found their peace and happiness. Their past wasn't supposed to find them there, ever.
But one day, the monster came knocking on their door again.

states.title: Guardian Angel on Strings
states.description:
Not so long ago, Mary took her frail, sickly sister and ran away from their monstrous father. The twins settled in a small, remote village, and thought they'd found their peace and happiness. Their past wasn't supposed to find them there, ever.
But one day, the monster came knocking on their door again.

states.title: Guardian Angel on Strings
states.description:
Not so long ago, Mary took her frail, sickly sister and ran away from their monstrous father. The twins settled in a small, remote village, and thought they'd found their peace and happiness. Their past wasn't supposed to find them there, ever.
But one day, the monster came knocking on their door again.

states.title: Almighty Lamp Spirit
states.description: Genie, the spirit inhabiting a certain magic lamp, shows up before those who have a sincere wish in their hearts. Though she wields magic no sorcerer on Erden could even dream of, once she's granted a person's three wishes, she gets locked away in her lamp for ten years.

states.title: Almighty Lamp Spirit
states.description: The time Genie can spend enjoying the outside world is limited, so whenever she isn't busy granting wishes, she tries to experience as much as possible. She pursues latest fashion. She collects gadgets. She learns new slang, and puts it to use without hesitation. And since she has to disappear for ten years every time her work is done, whenever she reappears, she seems a little out of date.

states.title: Almighty Lamp Spirit
states.description: Even when she's locked inside her lamp, Genie isn't the type to waste time moping. Instead, she immerses herself in pleasant memories—the conversations she had with the past owners of her lamp, the places she's visited, the things she's eaten. "I wonder what kind of rad stuff I'm gonna see next... Anyways, time to catch some Zs," she murmurs at last, and falls asleep for another ten years.

states.title: Princess of the Beach
states.description: The Princess of Fresalia and her personal attendant were in high spirits when they set out for the seaside—Cinderella had been saving money to buy a swimsuit specially for this occasion, and couldn't wait to show it off. However, when she emerged from the changing booth, Talia was nowhere to be seen.

states.title: Princess of the Beach
states.description:
As it turned out later, Talia had been called to the dream world to deal with an emergency. Unaware of that at the time—and thoroughly displeased—Cinderella sat on the sand to stare at the sea. She stayed like that for a long while, ignoring occasional compliments and pick-up lines, and mulling over one concern.
"Is Talia...embarrassed to be seen with me?"

states.title: Princess of the Beach
states.description:
And so, a secret wish sprouted in Cinderella's heart—she wanted social status that would allow her to stand by Talia's side as an equal. However, when an opportunity finally came to make this wish come true...she let it go voluntarily.
Because by that time, she had realized there was no reason to be ashamed of her current self—the one Talia was so fond of.

states.title: Pure-Hearted Knight
states.description: Since time immemorial, members of Unicorn's family have served individuals considered to be the saviors of the world. When Unicorn turned 14, she was sent on a journey to find the current generation's savior—the person destined to be her master—just like her father had when he had been her age. To aid her in her efforts, she was entrusted with her family's heirloom, a diadem adorned with a single horn—Chevalier's Grace.

states.title: Pure-Hearted Knight
states.description: And so, Unicorn embarked on her long, solitary journey. Though many dangers lurked along the way, they weren't enough to discourage her. Chevalier's Grace protected her from physical injuries, poison, and other direct threats, and, more importantly, she wasn't doing it out of obligation, but because becoming a fine knight serving her own master has always been her dream.

states.title: Pure-Hearted Knight
states.description:
In her travels, Unicorn has gotten lost, been arrested, and had many other unfortunate adventures. Still, she is not easily perturbed and tends to do things at her own pace, so when trouble comes, she just has a meal and a good night sleep—she has found that more often than not, things work themselves out before she knows it.
And so, having traveled across the world and beyond, she finally found you.
"Maybe this person will turn out to be my master..." she thinks, hope stirring in her heart.

states.title: Creature of the Void
states.description: The girl's name was R'lyeh. She was born into a secret organization—a dark cult worshiping an evil deity, rejected by all other nations on Erden. Her parents treated her indifferently—everything they cared about was the doctrine. And so, starved for their attention, she volunteered to be the sacrifice needed to summon their dreadful god.

states.title: Creature of the Void
states.description: When R'lyeh opened her eyes after the ritual, her parents were gone. Everyone was gone. There was only her, physically unharmed, with an incomprehensible voice echoing inside her head. It seemed the deity had refused the call, and decided to hide within her instead of manifesting. From the tone of its voice, R'lyeh got an impression that it was scared of something, though she had no way of knowing what of or why.

states.title: Creature of the Void
states.description:
R'lyeh's sole purpose in life has always been simple: being useful to others. The evil deity took advantage of that facet of her character and merged with her, transforming both of them into something new—Cthulhu R'lyeh. A mental bond has been formed, tying her to the monster—a bond that cannot be broken, not even if the monster gets expelled from within her.
"Iä! Iä! Cthulhu fhtagn—"

states.title: The Perfect Empress
states.description:
Having scored 32 victories in 32 battles, the first Empress of Lugrasse celebrated her success by commissioning a portrait.
In a word, she's a genius. Undefeated as a military officer, she continued her string of triumphs after ascending the throne—whatever she declared she'd do, she was sure to achieve. And the people of Lugrasse loved her for it.

states.title: The Perfect Empress
states.description:
The girl Napoleon had been before she became a soldier, and later a monarch, didn't seem all that different from who she is now—and yet, she was not the same at all.
In her own words, she can grasp a thousand facts with a single glance; and with each glance, her mind gets flooded with information. The difference is, in the past it was all she could do not to fall apart when faced with her own uncontrollable intellect and the countless phenomena the world had to offer.

states.title: The Perfect Empress
states.description:
Once the applause has died down and the audience has left the theater, the empress takes off her crown and lets her mask slip.
Before her rise to power, Napoleon lethargically drifted through life, all her attention focused on not letting herself be overwhelmed with the excess of information in her head. Until one day, she realized she was essentially just waiting for herself to finally snap, and decided she wasn't going to let that happen. And so, she found herself a role to play, one that could give her restless mind a different purpose—the virtuous ruler her fellow countrymen had sought.

states.title: Fallen Pharaoh
states.description:
Aeon Lords aren't all created the same; some receive their Eternity simply to spread destruction during the Pandemonium, some for other purposes. Cleopatra was the latter—she was tasked with monitoring heads of state around Erden.
And so, she travels the world, asking the same question wherever she goes—a question that happens to mean a lot to her personally.
"What is a nation—its ruler or its people?"

states.title: Fallen Pharaoh
states.description:
Cleopatra didn't only gaze into the void; she was marked by it.
Within the void, there was a creature of dread and madness. People who lay their eyes on it couldn't think clearly, and those who were touched by it were driven completely mad.
Aeon Lords can rely on their Eternity to heal physical wounds, but even it cannot easily mend a shattered mind. Caught in an endless cycle of death, rebirth, anxiety and madness, Cleopatra eventually forgot even her own name.

states.title: Fallen Pharaoh
states.description:
Before she became an Aeon Lord, Cleopatra used to be a pure-hearted woman. She believed the world was inherently good, and was ready to sacrifice everything for the sake of her beloved nation. But she was betrayed by her advisors and the very people she devoted herself to. And that was what it took for the well-meaning queen to fall.
No matter how much fear Cthulhu subjected her to, she wouldn't sink into despair—because she had already reached its utter depths and emerged victorious.

states.title: Demon Vice-Commander
states.description:
A warrior whose name alone would terrify even the fiercest oni into submission—the famed vice-commander of the Shinsengumi.
Righteous and relentless, she was as stern with her comrades as she was with herself. She was the one who created the group's strict code of conduct, and, by enforcing it, transformed a band of rogues into a warrior elite.
The truth is, strictness was her way of showing them her affection.

states.title: Demon Vice-Commander
states.description:
She devoted her days and nights to her duty, and her fashion sense suffered for it. The fact that she looks so stylish now is only thanks to a certain comrade of hers.
"Soji, can I cut these frills off?"
"Are you kidding me? No!"

states.title: Demon Vice-Commander
states.description:
Hijikata loved everyone at the Shinsengumi more than anything. For her unit, she was ready to sacrifice everything, even her precious sense of justice. Still, Shinsengumi was an oni-hunting group—their work was bloody, and losing brothers in arms was an everyday occurrence.
She swore that she wouldn't let a single death go to waste and kept fighting, even when she became the last Shinsengumi member left alive.

states.title: Shinsengumi's Finest
states.description:
She was a sword prodigy, considered the best among the elite oni hunters of the Shinsengumi. Captain of the first unit, she could always be spotted leading the vanguard. When it came to swordsmanship, she made impossible possible on a daily basis. But the truth is, she had no real interest in the art of the sword.
"C'mon, that's boring! Let's talk about fashion! Or relationships!"

states.title: Shinsengumi's Finest
states.description:
Okita has always distrusted people—after all, in a world terrorized by the oni, her parents were killed by humans. Abandoned by her relatives, she ended up growing up at a sword school. There, her extraordinary talent was discovered, but it didn't take long for the other disciples to start avoiding her, not even trying to match her in a duel. Soon, she was out of her mind with boredom.
And then one day, a certain girl joined the school—one not afraid to face Okita head on.
She would go on to become Shinsengumi's vice-commander, and the object of Okita's feelings.

states.title: Shinsengumi's Finest
states.description: Heavens gifted Okita with a wealth of talent, but weren't as generous with her lifespan. The rapid advance of her illness couldn't be concealed for long, and soon she was removed from active service. "I wish I could live longer." "I wish I could still fight." "...I wish I could die by her side." Okita knew that if she was offered a chance to fulfill those wishes, she'd stop at nothing to take it.

states.title: Seaside Rabbit Princess
states.description:
It's Kaguya's first time seeing the sea, and her first time wearing a swimsuit as well. She has spent most of her life isolating herself from the outside world, but she didn't mind missing out on things—not if it meant she could save Erden.
Now she is standing next to someone very special to her, and her eyes are sparkling with joy. It's hard to believe that making her smile once seemed as impossible as the tasks she gave all her suitors.

states.title: Seaside Rabbit Princess
states.description:
Why did Kaguya ask Finn to bring her a moon stone? Because to her, the moon looked just as lonely as she felt. However, the moon wasn't alone at all—it could always count on the sun to lend it its light.
Kaguya, a rabbit from space, tries hopping around just like Erden's rabbits do, and then immediately turns bright red. Himiko must have put her up to it—which, when you look past the embarrassment, proves that Kaguya is no longer alone either.

states.title: Seaside Rabbit Princess
states.description:
Kaguya might not be alone anymore, but she still feels lonely at times. When the object of her affection isn't with her, she goes on solitary walks in the nearby bamboo grove—the place where she landed when she first came to Erden, and where she received her name. She can always find her peace of mind there.
Saving Erden has been her sole goal for a long, long time, but now that there's no need for that, she must face another challenge—her own future, and the feelings dwelling in her heart.

states.title: Avatar of Light
states.description: At that moment, Ludmilla should have died. But even as she found herself falling to the bottom of the valley, she felt no fear. She only felt pride from saving her fellow Red Dragon Knights through her sacrifice, and she had no doubt that her comrades would be able to carry on without her.

states.title: Avatar of Light
states.description:
And before she knew it, the ground below was right before her. The moment of her death had arrived. But in that very moment, she heard a voice, one that seemed divine and full of light. 
Then, all went dark.

states.title: Avatar of Light
states.description:
Ludmilla escaped her fate only because a divine being, the Primordial of Light, decided that the world still needed her presence. By making Ludmilla their Avatar, they saved her life.
She found herself confused by her newfound powers, and the wound from her fall refused to heal, causing her pain. Nevertheless, her resolve was unchanged and unbroken.
"As long as my heart continues to beat, I will always get back up, stronger than before!"

states.title: Troubadour of the Round Table
states.description: "Like a gust blowing silver petals across the battlefield..." That is how the knights of other nations describe the beautiful, but also terrifying sight of Tristan in battle. The invisible blades of sound that she creates can cut through multiple enemies at once, painting the ground beneath them with crimson.

states.title: Troubadour of the Round Table
