states.description: The noble house of Tristan has always served as the right hand of the king, and it was only natural that the young Tristan would be entrusted with being a companion and sparring partner of Princess Leidram. Despite being a confidante to the future king from a young age, even she hardly ever witnessed Leidram showing any genuine emotion.

states.title: Troubadour of the Round Table
states.description:
Being the Round Table's greatest musician, Tristan was especially popular amongst the populace of Camelot. Little did they know that she was actually terrified of being the center of attention.
"I-I know this is an important ceremony, but I... I'm feeling sick to my stomach... Could I please sit this one out?"

states.title: Legendary Sacred Blade
states.description:
Excalibur's memories from before she was sealed reach far into the past.
There once was a girl she called a friend. They played together on the isolated island that was their birthplace and only home.

states.title: Legendary Sacred Blade
states.description:
One day, Excalibur's friend took her to the coast.
"Let's leave this place together," she said. They took a boat and went into the unknown, in search of adventure. But this is where Excalibur's memories come to an abrupt end—she was betrayed and sealed in a cave in a faraway land.

states.title: Legendary Sacred Blade
states.description:
While she was sealed, Excalibur's mind was blank. And then, she remembered everything.
She was a weapon created by Morgan. Her purpose was to kill her "friend" if she ever got out of control.
All her pleasant memories faded, and so did her feelings.

A guardian spirit with the power of Darkness.
Enjoys stargazing.

states.title: Black-Hearted Gunslinger
states.description: When the power of the Last Faerie of Avalon warped Lancelot's soul, her preferences were completely reversed. She started inflicting pain just as enthusiastically as she had once sought it.

states.title: Black-Hearted Gunslinger
states.description:
Faces contorted in pain, voices begging for mercy, limbs shaking with fear—it all brought the new Lancelot pleasure. But whatever was left of the old her still screamed somewhere within her.
"Stop it! This is not who we are! We should be on the receiving end of thiiis!"

states.title: Black-Hearted Gunslinger
states.description:
You'd think some event from her childhood must have made her enjoy pain...and you'd be wrong. She was just born this way.
A genuine, natural pervert.

states.title: Seed of Evil
states.description: The Last Faerie of Avalon, once kept sealed deep beneath the island. She is the core of what has come to be known as the Curse of Avalon—hence her brother Morgan's decision to hide her from the world and those who'd be eager to abuse her power.

states.title: Seed of Evil
states.description:
Her underground prison was a dark, lonely place. Even the faeries didn't all know about her existence, and she had no one to talk to aside from Morgan.
Until one day, a certain girl came into her life, and suddenly she wasn't alone anymore.

states.title: Seed of Evil
states.description:
Lucifer dreamed about a world where she and her friend could be happy.
One day, the girls escaped Avalon together. However, during their journey Lucifer came to know the truth about her companion's nature: she was a living weapon, created to destroy the Last Faerie of Avalon.
And so, Lucifer decided to strike first. She sealed the weapon—her first friend, her only friend—away in a remote cave.

states.title: Herald of the Lightless Moon
states.description: When the power of the Last Faerie of Avalon warped Gawain's soul, the loyalty she had once had for King Arthur, but thought long gone, reawakened. That loyalty turned into blind faith, and anyone who opposed the king became her mortal enemy.

states.title: Herald of the Lightless Moon
states.description: Arthur Leidram wasn't Gawain's king anymore, she was a mass murderer—and yet, some part of Gawain must have still wanted to believe in her. It was hard to accept the fact that the ruler she once knew—noble and ready to risk her life for the people of Camelot—was just an act all along.

states.title: Herald of the Lightless Moon
states.description: Gawain was anxious about becoming the king's regent—she didn't feel she had the charisma or strength needed for the role. But she was alone in that judgment. The rest of the Round Table and the people of Camelot loved her, captured by her kind and honest nature.

states.title: Frost Flower Maid
states.description:
"Welcome home, my lord!"
Snow White finds the work of a maid rewarding. She is glad she can offer her expertise in cooking and housekeeping to the master she adores.

states.title: Frost Flower Maid
states.description: "Welcome home...my lord..." Snow Black finds the work of a maid humiliating. How is it possible that she, Queen of Nightmares, has to serve some foolish lordling? Honestly, she should just smother him in his sleep...

states.title: Frost Flower Maid
states.description:
Nevertheless, Snow Black gets performing domestic chores down to a fine art in no time at all, and every time her master smiles and praises her cooking, deep in her heart she feels a spark of—
"Nothing! I'll thank you to stop talking nonsense!"

states.title: Weaver of Tales
states.description: Murasaki Shikibu was unmatched in her pursuit of knowledge from a very young age. Once she reached adulthood, her erudition was noticed by a certain powerful aristocrat, and he made her his daughter's tutor. While she held that position, her novel The Tale of Genji reached a million characters in length, and attained the status of a masterpiece.

states.title: Weaver of Tales
states.description: Murasaki finished writing her magnum opus earlier than most historians believe, and her life was shorter than they assume as well. She faced death with a single regret in her heart: the fact that The Tale of Genji was the only work she ever completed.

states.title: Weaver of Tales
states.description: However, Murasaki's creativity hadn't escaped the notice of a certain Primordial, and when her final moments approached, she was offered a new life as an Avatar. She accepted it with gratitude—for as long as she is alive, she can continue spinning tales of love.

states.title: Guardian of the Sea
states.description: Eva was born as the sixth princess of the merfolk kingdom, far away from human dwellings on land. Her voice was the finest among her people, and sea creatures came from far and near just to listen to her sing. She was her country's most beloved treasure.

states.title: Guardian of the Sea
states.description: But the peaceful merfolk kingdom wasn't beyond the reach of the Pandemonium. Hordes of monsters raged under the sea as violently as they did on land; Eva's countrymen came under attack, and in the end, the kingdom fell. All the merfolk lost their lives—apart from one.

states.title: Guardian of the Sea
states.description:
Overcome with grief, Eva made a pact with a divine being and gained the power to protect the seas. But her new abilities came with a price—everyone she met forgot about her the very next day.
For 2000 long years, she fought one lonely battle after another, doomed to have her existence wiped from people's memory no matter what she did.

A guardian spirit with the power of Water.
Enjoys days at the beach.

states.title: Celestial Bride
states.description:
Wukong was only too glad to wear the heavenly robe, but she wasn't aware of its original purpose. When she finally learned that it was a wedding outfit, her face flushed deep red.
"Whaaa??? It's that kind of robe!? No way!"

states.title: Celestial Bride
states.description: Wukong couldn't wrap her head around the idea of a robe only meant to be worn for one occasion—especially not for a ceremony performed to unite two people for the rest of their lives. Her mind was always occupied with food, training, Tianzhu, food, Nimbus, food, food, food... She couldn't even imagine herself falling in love.

states.title: Celestial Bride
states.description:
And yet, a certain name came to her mind—someone she could see herself marry. She shook her head violently.
"This kind of stuff doesn't suit me at all!" she yelled, but just as was about to take the robe off, she heard that person's voice saying, "That's a pity. You'd look so pretty as a bride," and she felt herself turn red as a beet again.
"I wouldn't! Stupid!"

states.title: Legendary Thief
states.description:
"I am the master thief, bringer of freedom!"
A woman's laughter echoes through the streets of Edo. She is Goemon Ishikawa—the elusive and fearless wanderer who shows up wherever people suffer oppression.

states.title: Legendary Thief
states.description: Goemon's Gang's true target was never money or treasure, only freedom. They helped people oppressed by corrupt authorities, earning a reputation as noble outlaws.

states.title: Legendary Thief
states.description:
Still, Goemon didn't hesitate to call herself a criminal. The reason why could be found in her past, but she never let anyone learn anything about it.
Perhaps the one who needed liberation the most was Goemon herself—a woman bound by the shadows of her past.

states.title: Legendary Thief's Backup
states.description: Mysterious silhouettes flickering in the dark, targeting their opponents' weak points with surgical precision. They might be nothing but phantoms created by Goemon's masterful ninjutsu, but the damage their blades can deal is no illusion.

states.title: Legendary Thief's Backup
states.description: Mysterious silhouettes flickering in the dark, targeting their opponents' weak points with surgical precision. They might be nothing but phantoms created by Goemon's masterful ninjutsu, but the damage their blades can deal is no illusion.

states.title: Legendary Thief's Backup
states.description: Mysterious silhouettes flickering in the dark, targeting their opponents' weak points with surgical precision. They might be nothing but phantoms created by Goemon's masterful ninjutsu, but the damage their blades can deal is no illusion.

states.title: Wandering Swordmaster
states.description: Rumor has it that a certain gang of thieves has hired an exceptional swordmaster as their guard. Swinging a longsword with unprecedented ease and cutting opponents down without as much as a single sound, she strikes fear in the hearts of those who would rather see the gang gone.

states.title: Wandering Swordmaster
states.description: Kojiro Sasaki was born into a samurai household. After the untimely death of her mother, she lived alone with her father, whose forced retirement from the way of the warrior due to an injury prompted him to put all his unfulfilled dreams onto his daughter's shoulders. His fixation with raising the perfect swordsman resulted in extreme strictness, which kept young Kojiro constantly discouraged instead of motivating her.

states.title: Wandering Swordmaster
states.description: Kojiro had always thought of her own sword skills as disgraceful—her father's words, outweighing any praise she'd ever received from others and always holding her back. But there were actually other words hidden beneath them, carved deep into her heart—once she rediscovered those, her potential was finally unleashed.

states.title: Inventor Extraordinaire
states.description: Leonardo da Vinci was raised in a Bergarian village surrounded by nature. She has displayed genius tendencies since early childhood. Her talents spanned from science to magic, poetry and art.

states.title: Inventor Extraordinaire
states.description: Da Vinci was twelve when the rumors of her genius reached the capital and she was invited to work at the Imperial Research Institute. She started accumulating achievements, paying no heed to the envy and ridicule she got from her fellow researchers. She provided Bergaria with designs for various technological innovations, such as magical analysis goggles and antigravity engines for flying vessels.

states.title: Inventor Extraordinaire
states.description:
However, after a few years at the institute, Da Vinci started feeling uneasy. The fruits of her innocent creativity were being used for questionable purposes, weren't they? And the field of study assigned to her by the empire was too narrow for her liking.
Eventually, the young inventor decided to run away and enjoy the world to the fullest.

states.title: Petite Demon Overlord
states.description: Demonfolk are a legendary race said to have once inhabited Erden. Due to their innately high magical power and physical strength, they ruled over all other races.

states.title: Petite Demon Overlord
states.description: However, even at the height of their short-lived glory, the demonfolk couldn't escape the clutches of the Pandemonium. The few who managed to evade the Eternal and his hordes of crazed monsters hid themselves in remote corners of the world, waiting for better times.

states.title: Petite Demon Overlord
states.description: Satan is the descendant of the demonkin survivors. Her magical potential is enormous, but she can't really use her powers to their full extent. Still, thanks to her positive attitude, burning ambition, and caring heart, she managed to gradually rekindle the spark of hope in the remnants of her race—though they knew well how frail hope can be, they couldn't help but love her.

states.title: Divine Dragon Lord
states.description: Legends say there are six Dragon Lords, one per every element of Erden: Fire, Storm, Water, Earth, Light and Shadow. They all share the goal of defeating the Eternal, but the Dragon Lords of Light and Shadow are also destined to eternally clash with each other.

states.title: Divine Dragon Lord
states.description: Weary and covered in scars left by battles with her archenemy and countless adversities, the Dragon Lord of Light looked for a place to make her final lair. At last, she reached the mountains, and lived there in peace and solitude for years—until the day the silence of her home was broken by the sound of footsteps.

states.title: Divine Dragon Lord
states.description:
The intruder introduced herself as Rias. She was a fearless and irreverent girl, and she loved her village more than anything. A certain young man she promised to spend her life with lived there too.
The moment she asked to become the Dragon Lord's next vessel, the young man's face flashed across her mind.
"You've always been popular with the girls," she thought to herself, "I'm sure you'll be fine without me."
Still, a faint memory of him and a hint of longing remained in the depths of the Dragon Lord's soul for years.

A guardian spirit with the power of Fire.
Enjoys hot baths.

states.title: Paintbrush Virtuoso
states.description:
Hokusai Katsushika was an art prodigy with a promising future ahead of her. She started winning one art competition after another at a very young age.
And then, one day, she learned that she was a Vessel.

states.title: Paintbrush Virtuoso
states.description: Hokusai's parents and everyone who knew her mourned the loss of a future master artist to the Requiem. Hokusai herself felt dejected too. But then, she met Hibiki. Though she had mostly focused on still life and abstract art before, she found new inspiration in the grace of Hibiki's movements.

states.title: Paintbrush Virtuoso
states.description: From that moment on, she painted Hibiki and only Hibiki. Expressing her muse's raw beauty through her art became Hokusai's only purpose. To her, Requiem wasn't a long-dreaded hell, but a divine chance to portray Hibiki at the height of her glory. As long as she could leave behind records of true beauty, Hokusai didn't care how much blood she was going to get on her hands.

states.title: Divine Mecha Girl
states.description: It was only a matter of time before the hundredth Vessel was going to be discovered, and Luther von Draclow—the head of the Red Dragon Organization—was growing anxious. Anticipating the worst, he approved a new set of equipment for Anya—knowing full well that it might put her in danger.

states.title: Divine Mecha Girl
states.description: Anya's new equipment included a Quantum Amplification Unit—a device capable of forcibly awakening the girl's latent abilities by pushing her computational capabilities to their very limits. However, the rapid amplification drastically increased the load on her brain, raising fears that it could endanger her life.

states.title: Divine Mecha Girl
states.description:
Thanks to the new equipment and a certain devilish plan, Anya's true power was unleashed—but at the same time, the extreme strain on her brain caused her to fall into a coma.
Looking at his daughter as she lay in a hospital bed, Luther was consumed by deep remorse.

states.title: Invincible Battleship Maiden
states.description: Yamato, was a child prodigy boasting extraordinarily excellence in everything she did, from academics to sports, and she devoted herself particularly to community service. Possessing a stronger sense of discipline and justice than anyone else, she was the type to charge headlong to prevent any wrongdoing she witnessed, heedless of the danger.

states.title: Invincible Battleship Maiden
states.description: Even after being chosen as a Vessel, at the Shinano Academy—a training facility for Vessels—she naturally took on the role of guiding the other students and became their student council president. Although she was strict about rules, she was also compassionate and responsive to the students' circumstances, which earned her deep trust and popularity.

states.title: Invincible Battleship Maiden
states.description: Though such a serious individual, her way of unwinding is by reading weapon magazines and assembling model kits. If you listen closely you can hear her mutterings from the workshop. "The quality of the rigging is just incredible! The weight of the bridge is perfect, and look at the beauty of these torpedo launchers...!"

states.title: Great Phantom Thief
states.description: Raised in a dazzling royal court as Princess of the Kingdom of Storano, Zoro possessed both  elegance and arrogance, a truly 'perfect young lady.' She had no patience for uncouth behavior, and cheap cuisine was absolutely out of the question—an attitude revealing her natural haughtiness. Even so, if someone clearly needed help, she would surreptitiously aid them.

states.title: Great Phantom Thief
states.description: Her younger sister, Nicole, was her entire world. Though Nicole was diligent and Zoro was free-spirited, they read books together, romped across the fields, and were each other's closest friend. But tragically, Nicole lost her life to illness.

states.title: Great Phantom Thief
states.description: Ever since she lost her sister, her nightly routine changed. Though cloaked in the royal family's prestige, she secretly brandishes her sword for the nameless masses. What she steals is authority; what she challenges is injustice. A masked thief known to no one—her eyes, even now, remain fixed on her sister's future.

states.title: Princess of the Black Moon
states.description: A girl descended upon a land in a remote corner of Eastland. An old man who found her sleeping, eyes closed. When he went to help her, he soon realized the incurable disease afflicting him had vanished. In time, people came to worship her as a god, and a small village was established around her.

states.title: Princess of the Black Moon
states.description: Her true name is NA91. The cleansing power that led people to treat her as a god was originally given to her to neutralize the poison of her predecessor, NA88. She set foot on earth for one mission alone—to build a land where a new species could thrive after humanity perished.

states.title: Princess of the Black Moon
states.description: "Expendable"—that was the other name given to her. Launched to Erden from another star, she carried only enough fuel for a one-way trip. Once she fulfilled her mission, that would be the end. Merely a tool. She was never meant to harbor feelings for anyone.

states.title: Arbiter of the Heavens
states.description: She was born into a tribe living deep in the eastern forest. But while she was still a newborn, the village was suddenly attacked and its people scattered. Cornered by the attackers and the advancing flames, her parents hid her in a dark part of the forest and there, they quietly lost their lives.

states.title: Arbiter of the Heavens
states.description: Kirin—a sacred beast that is an Avatar of the Primordials—found the girl in the forest and raised her. When she reached her sixteenth spring, Kirin returned her to the living world. Time passed, and the now-grown girl once again appeared before Kirin, cloaked in the same loneliness as before.

states.title: Arbiter of the Heavens
states.description:
"You need to take responsibility for keeping me alive, Pa."
The once-girl was full of latent potential. Recognized by the Primordial of Death, she newly took on the name of Kirin. Now, determined to become a hero that saves others—just like her father saved her—she sets forth on the path of an Avatar.

A guardian spirit with the power of the Storm.
Enjoys rainy weather.

states.title: Marshal of Darkness
states.description: The Greyford soldiers were filled with skepticism. "I heard that an instructor is being sent from Rigland to train us. And a woman at that." "Hah, a woman? Such an insult. Maybe we should show her a little affection."

states.title: Marshal of Darkness
states.description:
"She's a demon... She's come here to kill us all..."
The Greyford soldiers couldn't help but mutter this under their breath. But as for Ludmilla, she simply loved training and sincerely wished, more than anyone else, for them to become stronger.

states.title: Marshal of Darkness
states.description: Ludmilla burned with a passion. Her orders were to train the soldiers of an allied nation. And though she is usually calm and intelligent, because of her overwhelming love and passion for training, she had become unusually simple-minded. So much so that she fell for a simple hypnotism...

states.title: Glorious Queen
states.description: Elizabeth was born as the princess of the Kingdom of Greyford. She has little memory of her father, the king, as he succumbed to illness and passed away while she was still young. After his death, her mother ascended the throne, and with exceptional governance, rebuilt the desolate kingdom during her reign.

states.title: Glorious Queen
states.description: However, when Elizabeth was only fifteen, her mother caught the same illness and slipped away from this world. From that day onward, the once crybaby, Elizabeth, changed. She never showed a single tear. She never uttered a word of complaint. She simply continued forward, determined to become like the great queen her mother was.

states.title: Glorious Queen
states.description: Her mother had been brilliant, decisive, and undoubtedly a charismatic queen. In contrast, Elizabeth was a crybaby, clumsy, and at times a bit selfish. Yet, she possessed unmatched determination to give it her all and a mysterious charm that caused others to want to support and follow her. This too is one form of a great queen.

states.title: Maid of Darkness
states.description: A maid, by the name of Clarice, suddenly appeared in the Greyford palace. The silverware she polished was flawless, the morning tea was always at the perfect temperature, the hallways she cleaned did not have a speck of dust. She accomplished her every duty even before being ordered—truly, the perfect maid.

states.title: Maid of Darkness
states.description: However, her demeanor could hardly be called submissive. She would even defy the young queen. "You thought you could tame me? How utterly presumptuous." Stung by her words and thrown off by her whims, the courtiers soon formed a secret fan club.

states.title: Maid of Darkness
states.description: Within Clarice, Ludmilla was the immovable, absolute number one. That will never change. But she began to see flickering mirages of others in her cold, isolated world. These were colored differently. Colored with words like friendship and affection; words she had never known before.

states.title: Goddess of Victory
states.description:
Nike's talent stood out even among the temple elite. At the mere age of seventeen, her pure magical power already rivaled that of the priests. Everyone believed she was destined to become an amazing Priestess of Time.
However, that very talent, coupled with her seeming aloofness, made her the target of envy. One would often find her alone on temple grounds.

states.title: Goddess of Victory
states.description: It was during such a time that she met Rolotia. In this caged world, the way Rolotia spoke of freedom became the embodiment of hope for Nike. Yet, the hope she embraced on that day deepened the unfathomable despair she felt when Rolotia vanished.

states.title: Goddess of Victory
states.description:
Through the rift of time, Nike wandered. Millennia, millions of years, an eon passed, and there she was, alone. At long last, she found Rolotia. But this was not the Rolotia that imparted her hope all those years ago.
If that's the case, I will bring back the true Rolotia, free and unbound.

states.title: Primordial of Time
states.description: Chronos, the Primordial of Time, not only has the magical capacities that rival the gods, she is also able to manipulate all forms of time at will. Yet, she imposed strict rules upon herself, lowering herself to the level of a time mage. For the power of time is a force to be feared—wielded without restraint, it can unmake the fate of the world itself.

states.title: Primordial of Time
states.description: As a Primordial, except in extremely rare circumstances, she forbade herself from interacting with humans. Her will and words were always conveyed to the world through Rolotia. Over time, Rolotia became more than just a conduit to the mortal world, she became one Chronos could call a true friend.

states.title: Primordial of Time
states.description: Even Rolotia has no idea how Chronos usually lives. But one day, when Rolotia was visiting the Temple of Time, she paused in front of a particular door. From within, she could hear shrill cries of excitement and heavy breathing. This room was strictly off-limits, a room stacked high with books that should never be opened.

states.title: Corrupted Sorceress of Time
states.description:
That day, that moment, Rolotia chose life over death. But what awaited her was no blessing, it was a curse.
Imprisoned by the one she loved, her powers exploited, her sanity eroded away... losing even her soul.

states.title: Corrupted Sorceress of Time
states.description:
"Come on, gimme more sweets! If you don't...I'll throw a tantrum!"
Once again, Chronos holds her head in her hands, terrorized by the little devil that has taken up residence in the Temple of Time.

states.title: Corrupted Sorceress of Time
states.description:
Though on the verge of madness, stuck in the depth of darkness, there remained a voice, steadfast beside her, calling out to her from her memory.
"What a pathetic face. Get on your feet—you're stronger than this, aren't you?"

A guardian spirit with the power of Earth.
Enjoys tending gardens.

states.title: Knight of Silver
states.description: Clare was raised in a peaceful village under the loving care of her parents. Though shy by nature, she had a love for adventure. One day, when lost in the forest, she was rescued by Rizette from the neighboring village. From that day on, the two became close friends. Clare admired Rizette for being a highly skilled hunter and viewed her as a dependable big sister.

states.title: Knight of Silver
states.description: From then on, Rizette would visit Clare's home, sometimes bringing her younger brother along with her. Clare admired the siblings. One, the brave sister and the other, the clever brother. Gradually, the two became irreplaceable family to her. However, a single misunderstanding tore the relationship to shreds.

states.title: Knight of Silver
states.description: Since childhood, Clare has admired Rizette and trained in secret. Because of this, while undergoing the intense training under the Silver Knights, it became clear that she possessed exceptional talent. Now, she has sworn in her heart to use that strength for the sake of her cherished friend and the order.

states.title: Raging Dragon
states.description: Zhuge Liang was born into a prestigious family. However, at the time, the ruling elite used the pretext of national survival and prosperity to oppress tribal and minority groups. As a child, Zhuge Liang dedicated herself to both scholarly pursuits and martial training—but deep in her heart, she harbored quiet doubts about the injustice surrounding her.

states.title: Raging Dragon
states.description: In time, Zhuge Liang happened upon irrefutable evidence of large-scale corruption involving high-ranking government officials. Driven by her sense of justice, she resolved to reveal the truth. Yet, due to a political conspiracy, she was branded a traitor, accused of plotting to overthrow the state, and was forced to flee for her life. After exposing the truth to the people, she escaped, eventually crossing the sea and arriving on this continent.

states.title: Raging Dragon
states.description: A remote town became her second home and there she met new allies, founding a vigilante group. As rumors of her deeds spread, powerful warriors gathered from across the land. The group grew, eventually becoming the Silver Knights—a symbol of justice and hope. For a brief moment, Zhuge Liang found happiness. But that peace would soon be threatened by the looming shadow of Bergaria.

states.title: Automaton of Memories
states.description:
Pinocchio's earliest memory was the sight of many adults surrounding her.
"You have a special talent. Use it for the sake of our nation."
That is all they told her. Pinocchio couldn't go against those words. She had no choice but to obey.

states.title: Automaton of Memories
states.description:
"Where are my mama and papa?"
But no one would answer. Forced to delve into the memories of others over and over, Pinocchio's heart was gradually overwritten. Even so, she continued to believe that her parents were surely somewhere in her sealed memories.

states.title: Automaton of Memories
states.description:
Report by Jiren
"We have implanted a sealed memory deep in the psyche of the target automaton. This memory is empty, with no actual substance. This measure was taken to make the doll believe it has lost memories, thereby preventing an ego collapse and loss of control."

states.title: The One-Eyed Swordsman
states.description: Masamune was raised on a small island called Takagashima. Naturally quiet, she would hide whenever traveling merchants came to visit. However, she held deep affection for the other islanders, and they in turn were fond of the awkward Masamune.

states.title: The One-Eyed Swordsman
states.description:
One summer night on the island, amidst the clamor of the festival, Masamune accepted a juice handed to her by a certain foreigner and drank it without a care.
But in the next moment, her consciousness sank into darkness—and when she awoke, she had lost the light in her left eye. What's more, her beloved island companions had transformed into oni.

states.title: The One-Eyed Swordsman
states.description:
Masamune vowed to protect everyone.
She couldn't allow the islanders to come into contact with the outside world. If people from the Land of Peace found out, it might get reported, and a subjugation force could be sent. So Masamune took it upon herself to drive outsiders away from the island. But for someone as kind as her, it was an unbearably painful and agonizing role.

states.title: Blade of Tomorrow
states.description: Ryoma Sakamoto was born and raised in a small village tucked away in a corner of the Eastern Continent. Far from developed and with a modest population, the village was home to gentle and kind-hearted people. Thanks to her natural cheerfulness and friendly personality, she was loved by the villagers from a young age and spent her days as a beloved figure among them.

states.title: Blade of Tomorrow
states.description: However, one day, the village was suddenly attacked by an Oni known as Hoshikuma-Douji and her followers. Ryoma was ordered by her mother to hide under the eaves, where she held her breath, remaining perfectly still. When all was quiet, she fearfully stepped outside. There, she found the lifeless bodies of the villagers — including her parents — strewn across the ground.

states.title: Blade of Tomorrow
states.description: That day, Ryoma left the village and began traveling alone across the land, her hatred toward the Oni growing ever stronger in her heart. Eventually, she learned that the Oni leader resided in the capital. She vowed to defeat that leader with her own hands and made it her life's goal to build a peaceful world free of Oni.

states.title: Admiral of Debt
states.description: Perry was born in a prosperous, civilized nation far away. There, advanced technology thrived—rivaling or even surpassing that of Bergaria. Perry's father, both an adventurer and a scientist, played a part in its progress.

states.title: Admiral of Debt
states.description: The eyes of the young Perry always sparkled at the sight of the exotic treasures and minerals her father brought back from his expeditions. She worked hard toward her dream, determined to one day become an adventurer who would explore unknown lands. A year ago, she finally obtained government approval and set out as an adventurer. But around that time, her father, Ganon, vanished without a word, leaving no trace.

states.title: Admiral of Debt
states.description:
She secured a hefty loan from the government, bought a ship, and set off for the open sea—
However, Perry soon realized the truth: if she returned with nothing to show for it, this would quickly turn into nothing more than a high-interest mega-debt cruise.
Since then, she has kept a sharp, watchful eye day and night to ensure not a single piece of equipment goes missing, and the moment she hears a rumor about treasure, she immediately jumps at the opportunity.

states.title: Cursed Demon Princess
states.description: Hibiki Himeno was never discouraged. Not when she became a vessel. Not when the false requiem began. Even in the depths of despair, she laughs, her eyes always lit with the light of the future.

states.title: Cursed Demon Princess
states.description:
But what if this body itself was a fabrication?
What if her memories had been forged?
What if there was no actual future in the first place?
Could she still overcome that despair?

states.title: Cursed Demon Princess
states.description:
Now, only one thing is true.
Only one thing anchors her.
The days she spent with her dear friend.
Hibiki resolved to live as long as that friend was alive as well. Even if they were never to meet again.

states.title: Moonveiled Agent
states.description: Elmina works in the shadows as an special agent of the Red Dragon Organization. An existence of shadows, her missions are primarily espionage and infiltration... at times, even assassination. Only Luther and the upper echelons of the organization know her name. Her very existence is shrouded in secrecy.

states.title: Moonveiled Agent
states.description: In the past, Elmina was taken in by the Church as an orphan, tasked with finding and bringing back vessels. Yet, as she came to learn the truth behind the Requiem, she began to feel sympathy for the girls. Eventually, she was taken in by Luther and the Red Dragon Organization, which proclaims the goal of creating a world without vessels. There, she began her path as a special agent.

states.title: Moonveiled Agent
states.description:
"Your mission is to capture a girl who holds the fate of the world—and, if necessary, to take her life."
The moment Elmina received this order, she understood that, among the countless assignments she had carried out, this would be the most difficult and painful of them all.

states.title: Peachy Big Sister
states.description: Momo Fujiwara shared the same father as Reina, yet she was born to a woman who was never his wife. Because she was acknowledged by her father, her family name in the registry was Fujiwara, but Momo and her mother were kept at a distance from the main family, living in a detached house on the Fujiwara estate.

states.title: Peachy Big Sister
states.description: From an early age, Momo was a lively child, full of curiosity. She had a good relationship with her mother, but the rest of her family looked at her coldly. She often saw Reina on the estate grounds and treated her like a little sister, doting on her and playing together. However, Reina was always warned not to play with "that girl."

states.title: Peachy Big Sister
states.description: The day before Reina was taken to the academy, after it was revealed she was a vessel, Momo discovered that she had been crying. After that, Momo joined the cult led by Elysian, believing that since they proclaimed liberation from Pandora, they might be able to save Reina.

states.title: Revenant of the Round Table
states.description: Arthur Leidram entered an endless dream woven by Merlin's magic, there she took her final breath. Yes, she had shed the blood of many. But she had striven for her ultimate goal. There were no regrets.

states.title: Revenant of the Round Table
states.description: The forbidden arts of the Uzlavian queen led King Arthur to her awakening. In the depths of the dream, she realized that the Knights of the Round Table still carried a vast emptiness in their hearts.

states.title: Revenant of the Round Table
states.description: She rises—as the King of Knights, to bring an end to all fate. When at last her life was extinguished, a faint smile graced her lips, but not a single soul could comprehend the true meaning of that smile.

states.title: Relentless Knight
states.description: Don Quixote grew up in a small village on the outskirts of the northern continent. She was shy and clumsy. She always felt left behind by the other children, whether it was studying or sports. She never had any confidence in herself.

states.title: Relentless Knight
states.description: However, as she diligently chopped firewood every day to help her parents, the villagers began to notice that she possessed extraordinary strength. From then on, the village came to rely on her whenever monsters appeared. She felt truly happy to have discovered a talent that allowed her to help others.

states.title: Relentless Knight
states.description: One day, she heard from the villagers about the mightiest knight order, the champions of justice and glory, the Knights of the Round Table. Her dream was set. With unwavering diligence and unshakable sincerity, she moved the hearts of the villagers. And at the age of eighteen, with their blessings, she finally set off for Camelot.

states.title: Frostbound Princess
states.description: Princess Anastasia of the Kingdom of Uzlavia was, by nature, a kind-hearted and free-spirited girl. But when King Arthur invaded her homeland and slew her parents before her eyes—her expression turned to ice, and her heart was sealed away in a deep, cold darkness.

states.title: Frostbound Princess
states.description: From that point on, no one could discern what dwelled within her heart. Many believed that, unable to bear the weight of her grief, she had locked her emotions away. But the truth was otherwise. On that day—when she saw the god of death, her form stained with blood, her face cold as ice—she was irresistibly entranced.

states.title: Frostbound Princess
states.description: A forbidden art had been passed down through the royal line of Uzlavia. It gives form to the dreams that dwell deep within human desire. Anastasia understood that she was not the only one; in the depths of their hearts, even the Knights of the Round Table longed for the coming of the god of death.

states.title: Dragon Maiden of Calamity
states.description: From time to time, the evil, calamity-bringing dragon would wreak destruction on towns across the land. So great was her power that people, filled with fear and awe, called her Bahamut, the "Winged Demon."

states.title: Dragon Maiden of Calamity
states.description: She slew countless dragon hunters and sought at last to bring the entire world under her dominion. But her ambition was suddenly crushed by the hand of the legendary dragonslayer, Siegfried. What became of her afterward, no one knows.

states.title: Dragon Maiden of Calamity
states.description: Near a remote village, deep within the forest, stands a small cottage. It is said that a woman and a young girl live there quietly. The girl is willful and unruly; the woman, slovenly yet kind. No one in the village knows who they truly are.

states.title: Red Dragon Knight of Virtue
states.description: Cera was raised in an orphanage within a kingdom steeped in corruption and decay. By nature, she was a shy and tidy girl, but her environment was abysmal. Funds were used to line the pockets of the orphanage's administrators while the children endured meager meals and the constant threat of violence from the caretakers.

states.title: Red Dragon Knight of Virtue
states.description: Amid those dark days, the Gru Grim suddenly attacked the orphanage. Cera was nearly abducted and had resigned herself to death—but she was saved by a certain woman, who also freed her from the orphanage's grasp. That woman was none other than Elmina, who had broken free from her brainwashing.

states.title: Red Dragon Knight of Virtue
states.description: In admiration of Elmina's strength, Cera traveled from town to town, honing her skills through relentless training. In time, she entered the Red Dragon Academy and graduated at the top of her class. Though she faced much opposition, she chose to turn away from the path of the elite and serve under her benefactor, Elmina—to repay the favor from years past.

states.title: Dragonslayer of Legends
states.description: Siegfried, once hailed as the legendary dragonslayer. After a fierce battle with the calamitous dark dragon known as the "Winged Demon," she succeeded in sealing it away. However, the wounds she sustained in that battle ultimately forced her to retire from life as a swordswoman.

states.title: Dragonslayer of Legends
states.description: After retiring, Siegfried settled down in a quiet countryside with the dark dragon, now in the form of a young girl. Having earned a fortune from defeating the dragon, she had no intention of ever working again. Instead, she spends her days drinking, fishing and gambling while looking after the spoiled little dragon.

states.title: Dragonslayer of Legends
states.description: Before long, Siegfried had come to feel a motherly affection toward Bahamut. Her decision to live in seclusion was a way to keep the girl away from people and war. Once she becomes certain there is no longer any threat of Bahamut running wild, she plans to remove the collar and set her free.

states.title: God of Absolute Dominion
states.description: Zeus, the one and only god—In a world where gods and humans coexisted, she stood as the absolute authority. Though at times willful and tyrannical, her overwhelming power made her rule unshakable. And the people placed their trust in her.

states.title: God of Absolute Dominion
states.description: However... one day, gods from another world invaded Zeus's realm. Zeus put her life on the line, fighting to protect her people. But alone, she could not hold them off, and in time the people began to show open disappointment in her. As scorn rained down upon her, Zeus realized that she had never been loved by her people after all.

states.title: God of Absolute Dominion
states.description:
Even in that darkest moment, there was one woman who remained at Zeus's side. Though rebellious and always making snide remarks, she declared that she would believe in her till the very end.
Is this what they call true love? If even this woman were to betray me... then...

states.title: Cerulean Valkyrie
states.description: The girl, Rizette, stood defenseless before the Supreme God. At first glance, she seemed insignificant, unworthy of notice. Her skill and magical power were impressive, yes, but nothing more than what another human could attain. Only her eyes were different—they pierced straight through evil itself.

states.title: Cerulean Valkyrie
states.description: And so, Rizette, having caught the eye of the Supreme God, became a member of the Valkyries. In a different world, surrounded by different races, she was bewildered. Yet as she shared meals, clashed at times, and spent days together with the Valkyrie, she eventually found herself accepted as one of them.

states.title: Cerulean Valkyrie
states.description: And so, Rizette came to understand that no matter one's race or birthplace, the desire to take up the blade to protect someone dear is the same. Now, before her lies her wounded friend. So she stands up to uphold her own justice.

states.title: Goddess of Love
states.description: Venus, the goddess of love. Her beauty and maternal grace earned her the devotion of both gods and humans alike. But she has long been captive in an underground prison governed by the god of death. Her crime—murdering a god.

states.title: Goddess of Love
states.description: However, it is rumored that a god driven mad with love for her was consumed by jealousy and tried to kill her, only to be struck down instead... in other words, it was self-defense. Yet whenever one asks her about the truth, she offers nothing but a mysterious smile.

states.title: Goddess of Love
states.description: And so, the people, escaping the destruction of the foreign god, remained wary of the now-freed goddess. Is she truly an ally...? And yet, in time, their hearts were once again drawn toward her—toward the depths of her eyes, though none knew of her true intentions.

states.title: Asura of Carnage
states.description:
That night, thousands of oni descended upon Musashi. Though her armor was torn apart and her blade chipped, she cut down hundreds of them. She fought until dawn, but at last her strength failed her. Bound in chains, a special potion was forced down her throat.
Her screams were swallowed by the darkness as her eyes slowly stained red.

states.title: Asura of Carnage
states.description: Musashi's sanity fiercely resisted the oni transformation. Yet at the same time, a part deep within her was quietly exulting. Pure strength was flooding through her body. Fear and pleasure clashed, her blood burned hot, and before she knew it, her mind focused. She clung only to the sensation of victory, losing what it meant to be human.

states.title: Asura of Carnage
states.description: Now she had obtained unparalleled power. The doubts that had weighed on her were gone. Yet in the depths of her heart, there was a faint voice desperately calling out—the voice of a girl calling to her.

states.title: Master of Rashomon Gate
states.description: Kenshin was born into a family that had, for generations, overseen the guards of Rashomon Gate, the sole gate into the Capital. When Kenshin was fifteen, her father stepped down, and she became the head of the Uesugi family. Though free-spirited by nature, she possessed a strong sense of responsibility and was deeply trusted by her subordinates.

states.title: Master of Rashomon Gate
states.description: Her swordsmanship follows no particular school. Making use of her supple body and freeform thinking, she unleashes attacks that go far beyond her opponent's expectations. She possesses so much skill that an ordinary oni would be dispatched in an instant.

states.title: Master of Rashomon Gate
states.description: Due to its responsibilities, the Uesugi family maintained close ties with the Bureau of Onmyo, and it was there that Kenshin met her one and only best friend, Awa. The two were always together at the bureau, but one day Awa suddenly vanished without a trace. Ever since then, Kenshin has continued to search for clues while carrying out her duties, yet nothing has been found to this day.

states.title: Knight of the Red Banner
states.description: Mysha was taken in by Gilgan when she was young and grew to love him as her parent. In Urg Roa, she spent joyful days among the kud. Yet from time to time, a question would cross her mind: "Who really am I?"

states.title: Knight of the Red Banner
states.description: From a young age, Mysha would sometimes see the same dream. At night, deep within a dense, shadowy forest, she would be gently rocked in someone's arms. A gentle presence would whisper in a tearful voice, "Don't worry. Someday, I will come for you."

states.title: Knight of the Red Banner
states.description: When Mysha set foot in the capital, she felt a premonition. If she came here, she was sure she would finally learn who she truly was. Yet, alongside that hope came a deep unease—as if an unknown darkness lurking within her were about to gape wide open.

states.title: Apocalyptic Thunder God
states.description: Thor was the mightiest among the gods in existence, surpassed only by Odin, the Supreme God. However, she killed humans on a whim and slaughtered even her fellow gods. Because of her brutality, she was condemned as the Worst God and sealed away as a great sinner in the deepest depths of the world.

states.title: Apocalyptic Thunder God
states.description: The true reason the giants were imprisoned in the Abyss was to serve as scapegoats, should the Worst God ever break free of her seal. The giants had no knowledge of Thor's existence, yet they felt it. Laughter mingled with the silence of the night and there was the unbearably cold scent of death.

states.title: Apocalyptic Thunder God
states.description: She did feel emotions akin to affection and respect toward certain others. However, her way of expressing love was to destroy and before long no one remained by her side. She was lonely—yet she never knew what that meant.

states.title: Faithful Red Dragon
states.description: To the young Ruvi, Callen was her savior. Her parents were slain by demons during the Pandemonium, leaving the dying young dragon in the cold nest. It was none other than Callen who saved and raised her.

states.title: Faithful Red Dragon
states.description: Even without words, Ruvi possessed the intelligence to grasp Callen's intentions from a single expression. When Callen broke a magic-powered tool, it was Ruvi who fixed it. When she got a craving for sweets, it was Ruvi who thoughtfully hid them away.

states.title: Faithful Red Dragon
states.description: Ruvi welcomed the transformation brought about by Odin's device. Now she could talk with Callen and support her even more. To Ruvi, Callen was irreplaceable. Not only was she like a mother to her, she was also like a little sister who could not be left unattended.

states.title: Goddess of Blazing Flames
states.description: Battle was the entirety of her world. It was the ultimate way to speak heart to heart, to convey love, and to etch her existence into the world.

states.title: Goddess of Blazing Flames
states.description: However, now that she has to lead survivors and protect the weak, her values have wavered for the first time. The muffled sobs she hears on sleepless nights, the laments of those who have lost their homes, the small voices crying out in hunger... these were things her power, no matter how great, could not defeat.

states.title: Goddess of Blazing Flames
states.description: To protect those under her care, for the first time her life, Freya fetched water, stayed in hiding, and fought not to destroy—but to protect. She distanced herself from the blood-boiling, thrilling battles she once loved. And yet, she could feel it clearly—she was becoming stronger than ever before.

states.title: Harmonic Maiden
states.description:
Today we've got a very special guest!

Right as the Super Idol Mirai finishes her introduction, the Ultra-Super Idol Anya makes her grand appearance. The cheers are deafening. Some fans even faint on the spot just from seeing Anya standing there.

"All right, let's do our usual song!"

In perfect unison, the crowd raises their glow sticks and braces themselves in silence. Anya grips the microphone. One deep breath.

"Boom-boom, tss-tss, chicka-chicka-tss!"

Anya—the idol who rose to the very top of the industry through sheer vocal percussion!
And today's performance? She's in top form!

states.title: Harmonic Maiden
states.description:
Ultra-Hyper-Super Idol Anya's solo concert! The Anya & Astrid duo is the most popular act in the entire world!

On the big day, fans flood in from across the globe! Every mode of transportation is jammed to a standstill! Not a single person can make it to the venue!

Anya agonizes. "I want everyone to see the show... isn't there something I can do...?"

But Astrid remains perfectly calm. "You don't need to do anything at all."

Anya, who always thinks of her fans first, murmurs in distress. "How can you say that...!?"

"Because streaming tickets are a thing."
Anya was too busy worrying about her fans that she had completely forgotten about the streaming tickets.

And so, the livestream was a massive success!

states.title: Harmonic Maiden
states.description:
And now, Ultra-Hyper-Super-Galaxy-Ultra-Big-Bang Idol Anya's photo shoot!
The photographer calls out directions. "Astrid and Ultra-Hyper-Super-Galaxy-Ultra-Big-Bang Idol Anya — I need the two of you closer, closer!"

"Astri... can you come a little closer...?"

Astrid's face turns bright red. "D-don't give me that look... it's too adorable..."

"Astri... Here, let's hold hands..."

"So this is the hand of an Ultra-Hyper-Super-Galaxy-Ultra-Big-Bang Idol... it's so warm..."
Their eyes meet.
The tension builds—

Snap!
A notebook closes shut. On its cover: "Anya the Idol, Episode 3."

Holding the notebook, Anya mumbles awkwardly,
"Astri... what is this...?"

It was Astrid's secret hobby — a private little notebook she'd been drawing in. And she'd carelessly left it sitting out in the living room.

Red as a tomato, Astrid could only let out a squeak: "Eeeep..."

states.title: Maestro of Reveries
states.description:
She and Washington had been close collaborators since their student days. Together, they took on countless robotics competitions, sweeping up awards left and right.
Whenever they were called a genius duo, she would tease Washington to hide her own embarrassment—and be promptly scolded by her friend. That was happiness for her. Chopin wished those days could go on forever.
And yet, deep in her heart, she knew her illness was quietly but steadily getting worse. But even as her mind lingers on her approaching mortality, she nevertheless spent her days teasing Washington like usual.

states.title: Maestro of Reveries
states.description:
After graduation, the two were conscripted by the RDO and tasked with leading the "Dragon Head Project."
Together, they were able to perfect the theoretical basis for the device, as well as almost completing the construction of the device itself. But one final obstacle stood in their way: the device required a computational core on par with a human brain. This became the single, glaring void in their otherwise perfect blueprint.

In that moment, an answer flickered in Chopin's mind.

—Of course. They could just extract someone's actual brain to use as a substitute.
And with so little time left anyway, she was more than willing to be that someone.

states.title: Maestro of Reveries
states.description:
It was her own decision to complete the Dragon Head Project in exchange for her life. She believed it was the best solution—and understood, at the same time, that it was a foolish one as well. Even so, she felt no regret. It was a path only someone with so little time left could choose.

Chopin delights in teasing and confounding others, in watching their troubled faces that follow—but she is no villain. She wouldn't hesitate to offer her hand to a person in need, and she would be eager to do anything to make the world a better place.

She has convinced herself that this was the optimal choice. And yet, there was something that lingered in heart. A childish hope that Washington would scold her for doing something so reckless. This little wish was absorbed into the Dragon Head along with her consciousness.

If she could redo that fateful debate once more... maybe this time, Washington would be able to scold her.

...just maybe.

states.title: Always the Number One!
states.description:
Washington was an ordinary girl with unremarkable grades — the kind you could find anywhere. Then she met Chopin, a dazzling, almost blinding genius.

Strangely enough, they clicked. And for some reason, she alone could understand Chopin's outrageous ideas. Before she knew it, the two had become inseparable.

She never once doubted that she would stay by Chopin's side forever.

states.title: Always the Number One!
states.description:
As they grew older, Chopin's brilliance began to bloom at an astonishing pace.
As she merrily spoke of increasingly complex scientific theories, Washington felt more and more distance between them.
She used to understand Chopin. She had believed she was the only one who truly could. But the reality that she — the ordinary girl that she was — was slowly getting left behind frightened her...

states.title: Always the Number One!
states.description:
The thought of not being able to stay beside Chopin was unbearable. And so Washington made a decision: she would become a genius as well.

If she lacked talent, then she would make up for it with effort. To remain at Chopin's side, she studied more than anyone, thought harder than anyone, and never stopped challenging herself. In the end, that extraordinary determination allowed Washington to finally catch up to Chopin.

It was a struggle that she chose willingly — so that the two of them could always remain together.

states.title: Sugar, Spice, and Brute Force
states.description:
The third head of a distinguished lineage that inherits the title of "Locksmith" in the world of dreams.
Locksmiths make their living by breaking through the barriers of a dream world and rescuing the souls trapped within.
Most of her day-to-day work come from requests by Hypnos and Alice.

states.title: Sugar, Spice, and Brute Force
states.description:
Kintaro loves embroidered handkerchiefs, ribbons, lace accessories, fluffy stuffed animals, floral pouches...
After finishing a good day's work, there's nothing she enjoys more than hugging her cherished items closely and gushing "Awwww, soooo cute!"

states.title: Sugar, Spice, and Brute Force
states.description:
"Why does everyone seem to be so...afraid...of me?" Kintaro would often lament.
She believed it was because of her outfit was too intimidating.
But in truth, the real reason is the feral, unhinged roars she unleashes in the midst of her work and combat.

states.title: Red Dragon Dancer
states.description:
Long ago, when she had witnessed a ballet performance as a child, she saw it as something purely beautiful—something from a world far removed from her own.
But as she began living and training alongside the troupe, sharing meals with them and sweating in the same rehearsal hall, she realized she had been wrong.
Even within graceful movements and quiet steps, there lay the same resolve and discipline as when she practiced her sword.

states.title: Red Dragon Dancer
states.description:
Even on an unfamiliar stage, Clarice danced with a skill far beyond her own. And yet, not a trace of jealousy stirred in Ludmilla's heart.
What she felt instead was pure joy—that her dear friend had been recognized and found new bonds.
Determined to catch up in her own way, Ludmilla once again commits to her training with maximum gusto.

states.title: Red Dragon Dancer
states.description:
Clarice watched it all unfold—others derided Ludmilla as someone with no talent for dance.
But even without any talent, she would not stop—stumbling, falling, sweating, and still rising again with a smile.
The sight stole Clarice's heart again and again.
Even if her movements were far from graceful, to Clarice, Ludmilla's dance was more noble—and more beautiful—than anyone else's.

Clarice watched it all unfold—others derided Ludmilla as someone with no talent for dance.
But even without any talent, she would not stop—stumbling, falling, sweating, and still rising again with a smile.
The sight stole Clarice's heart again and again.
Even if her movements were far from graceful, to Clarice, Ludmilla's dance was more noble—and more beautiful—than anyone else's.

Clarice watched it all unfold—others derided Ludmilla as someone with no talent for dance.
But even without any talent, she would not stop—stumbling, falling, sweating, and still rising again with a smile.
The sight stole Clarice's heart again and again.
Even if her movements were far from graceful, to Clarice, Ludmilla's dance was more noble—and more beautiful—than anyone else's.

Clarice watched it all unfold—others derided Ludmilla as someone with no talent for dance.
But even without any talent, she would not stop—stumbling, falling, sweating, and still rising again with a smile.
The sight stole Clarice's heart again and again.
Even if her movements were far from graceful, to Clarice, Ludmilla's dance was more noble—and more beautiful—than anyone else's.

states.title: The Crowned Étoile
states.description:
Victoria was born as the eldest daughter of the long-standing Royal House of Wellmund.
Raised from childhood to one day succeed her father, the king, she received a thorough royal education. Combined with her exceptional talent, she has mastered horsemanship, etiquette, diplomacy, and politics.

states.title: The Crowned Étoile
states.description:
She also joined the Royal Ballet Troupe, one of Wellmund's proudest cultural institutions. There, she quickly blossomed as a skilled dancer and rose to the prestigious position of étoile—the very face of the entire troupe.
But when her father, the king, fell gravely ill and could no longer carry out his duties, Victoria had to inherit the throne. From that day on, she found herself consumed by the endless demands of being a queen.

states.title: The Crowned Étoile
states.description: Before long, her ballet training had to fall by the wayside. A perfectionist to her core, Victoria could not tolerate performing at anything less than her best, and resolved to leave behind the ballet she loved rather than drag down the rest of the troupe. But through the events of the recent incident, she came to understand the strength it takes to rely on others. And with the help of this strength, she hopes that once she has truly grown into her role as queen...she might one day return to the stage again.

A guardian spirit with the power of Light.
Enjoys basking in the sun.

states.title: Snow Maiden of Black & White
states.description: Light and shadow — Snow White and Snow Black. The soul of the shadow had begun to sense her own existence gradually fading away. This was because of emotions that had unexpectedly taken root within her, born from her interactions with the hero and Snow White.

states.title: Snow Maiden of Black & White
states.description: As though exploiting the opening left in her heart, the "other shadow" that was supposed to have been sealed away returns to life once more. She is the black witch, steeped in malice and hatred — the one who was vanquished by Snow Black after attempting to steal her body.

states.title: Snow Maiden of Black & White
states.description:
In the depths of darkness, Snow White and Snow Black joined hands. It was but a fleeting alliance — light and shadow were never meant to intertwine, for darkness is fated to be erased by the light. And yet, Snow Black did not disappear.
Without realizing it, she had already crossed the boundary into the light.

Aigis had no family either. As an infant, she was abandoned in the forest near a town. Though taken in by a local family who found her, she was treated as little more than labor—and in the end, she was cast aside once again.
Because of her distinct appearance and her timid nature, she remained alone for as long as she could remember.

Until she met Belle.

Because of her distinct appearance and her timid nature, she remained alone for as long as she could remember.

Until she met Belle.

Because of her distinct appearance and her timid nature, she remained alone for as long as she could remember.

Until she met Belle.

Belle was born in a small town. She was raised by her parents, but financial ruin tore the family apart—and Belle was left behind.
With nowhere else to go, she found herself among a group of urchins in the backstreets. Thanks to her natural dexterity and street smarts, it wasn't long before she had made a name for herself among the backstreet's shady residents.

Because of her distinct appearance and her timid nature, she remained alone for as long as she could remember.

Until she met Belle.

states.title: Pair of Morphean Flowers
states.description:
The fragile world the two lived in was unlike other dream worlds—it was unstable, doomed to collapse within a single day without fuel to keep it going.
That was why sacrificial victims were necessary.
But even if it meant offering up every single soul in existence, as long as the two of them could remain together for another day longer...that was all that mattered.

states.title: Dragon Lord of Shadow
states.description: His name is Crescent, and he's a very happy dragon. Or at least, he used to be. He doesn't remember all that much. One day, there was nothing but the dark. The next day, there were Luna, and Solas, and the girl with the fluffy white hair. And grapes! He had no reason not to be happy in a world with grapes and good friends. But one day, that stopped being enough. Something inside him, like a shadow on a moonless night, started following him. Whispering to him. There's more than this. More than this. Remember. Crescent doesn't know if he wants to. He thinks, if he does, he might never be happy again.

states.title: Dragon Lord of Shadow
states.description: Diabolos... The voice in Crescent's mind haunts him with that name. Diabolos. Not Crescent. Diabolos. You are Diabolos. He doesn't want that awful name. It sounds ancient, larger than he is, cursed with history he can't remember. Suddenly, his days with Luna and Solas seem so small, a speck of happiness against a shadow that threatens to consume him. He wants to protect his friends. He wants to stand by their side forever. But if he is Diabolos, and if the shadow inside him one day shows him its secrets... Will they even want to be near him?

states.title: Dragon Lord of Shadow
states.description:
The Dragon Lord of Shadow, known as Diabolos, never considered himself an ally of humanity. Only an enemy of the Pandemonium.

For centuries, not a soul set foot in the mountains where he made his home. The dragon would unleash his breath of void on any who came too close, plunging his victims in a realm of perfect darkness. Many thought him utterly invincible.

Except the Dragon Lord of Light, who slew him when he marched with the Bergarian Army as the Emperor's mount.

No one saw the fearsome Diabolos after that. Most thought the world rid of him forever, including the other Lords.

But perhaps it wasn't death he found in that ancient final fight. Perhaps it was a second chance.
